################################################################################
ARCHIVO: database\scripts\001-create-database.sql
TAMAîO: 1184 bytes
################################################################################

IF DB_ID(N'NaviToolsAssetsDb') IS NULL
BEGIN
    CREATE DATABASE [NaviToolsAssetsDb];
END
GO

USE [NaviToolsAssetsDb];
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Security')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Security');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Organization')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Organization');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Inventory')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Inventory');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'LifeCycle')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA LifeCycle');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Documents')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Documents');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Loans')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Loans');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Maintenance')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Maintenance');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Imports')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Imports');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Sync')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Sync');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Audit')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Audit');
GO



################################################################################
ARCHIVO: docker\docker-compose.yml
TAMAîO: 935 bytes
################################################################################

name: navi-tools-assets

services:
  sqlserver:
    image: mcr.microsoft.com/mssql/server:2022-latest
    container_name: navi-tools-sqlserver
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      ACCEPT_EULA: ${ACCEPT_EULA}
      MSSQL_SA_PASSWORD: ${MSSQL_SA_PASSWORD}
      MSSQL_PID: ${MSSQL_PID}
    ports:
      - "1434:1433"
    volumes:
      - navi_sqlserver_data:/var/opt/mssql
    networks:
      - navi_tools_network

  minio:
    image: minio/minio:latest
    container_name: navi-tools-minio
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: server /data --console-address ":9001"
    environment:
      MINIO_ROOT_USER: ${MINIO_ROOT_USER}
      MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD: ${MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD}
    ports:
      - "9100:9000"
      - "9101:9001"
    volumes:
      - navi_minio_data:/data
    networks:
      - navi_tools_network

volumes:
  navi_sqlserver_data:
  navi_minio_data:

networks:
  navi_tools_network:
    driver: bridge

# Configuraciµn segura - NAVI Herramientas

## Objetivo

Definir cµmo se manejarÃn las variables de entorno, cadenas de conexiµn, claves de MinIO, configuraciµn de Hangfire y archivos locales del proyecto NAVI Herramientas.

## Archivos que sÚ pueden subirse al repositorio

- appsettings.json
- docker-compose.yml
- local.env.example
- minio.example.json
- Documentaciµn tÕcnica

## Archivos que NO deben subirse al repositorio

- appsettings.Development.json
- appsettings.Local.json
- appsettings.Production.json
- local.env
- .env
- Archivos con contraseþas, tokens o secretos reales

## Servicios locales

SQL Server:

- Host: localhost
- Puerto: 1434
- Base de datos: NaviToolsAssetsDb

MinIO:

- API: http://localhost:9100
- Consola: http://localhost:9101
- Bucket: navi-tools-documents

Hangfire:

- Dashboard: /hangfire
- Base de datos: NaviToolsAssetsDb
- Esquema: HangFire

## Variables de entorno recomendadas

ConnectionStrings__NaviToolsAssetsDb
Minio__Endpoint
Minio__AccessKey
Minio__SecretKey
Minio__BucketName
Minio__UseSsl
Worker__Name
Hangfire__DashboardPath

## Regla principal

Las credenciales reales deben vivir en user-secrets, variables de entorno del servidor o archivos locales ignorados por Git.
Nunca deben quedar quemadas en archivos versionados.

NAVI Herramientas & Activos  Entrega tÕcnica MVP

1. Resumen ejecutivo

El MVP de NAVI Herramientas & Activos permite gestionar herramientas, activos de taller y su hoja de vida tÕcnica, integrando inventario, documentos, mantenimientos, accesorios, prÃcticas seguras, trazabilidad y exportaciµn de informaciµn.

El sistema fue construido como una soluciµn web basada en .NET 8, con API REST, panel administrativo en Blazor Server, almacenamiento documental en MinIO y persistencia en SQL Server.

El objetivo principal del MVP es demostrar el flujo funcional completo para administrar herramientas de taller, tomando como referencia el comportamiento esperado en Dynamics/Fenix365 y adaptÃndolo a un mµdulo especializado para control operativo, tÕcnico y documental.


2. Stack tecnolµgico

Backend: .NET 8 Web API
Frontend administrativo: Blazor Server
Base de datos: SQL Server
ORM: Entity Framework Core
Documentos: MinIO
Exportaciµn Excel: ClosedXML
Jobs / procesos futuros: Hangfire
Documentaciµn API: Swagger
Control de versiones: Git / GitHub


3. Servicios locales del MVP

API: http://localhost:5218
Admin: http://localhost:5264
MinIO API: http://localhost:9100
MinIO Console: http://localhost:9101


4. Soluciµn y proyectos

Soluciµn principal:

NAVI Herramientas & Activos  GuÚa rÃpida para ejecutar el MVP desde cero

1. Objetivo de la guÚa

Esta guÚa explica cµmo levantar el MVP de NAVI Herramientas & Activos en un equipo local, validando API, Admin, base de datos, almacenamiento documental y exportaciµn de hoja de vida tÕcnica.

El objetivo es que otro desarrollador pueda abrir el proyecto, compilarlo y probar el flujo principal del sistema.


2. Requisitos previos

El equipo debe tener instalado:

- .NET SDK 8 o superior.
- Docker Desktop.
- Git.
- Visual Studio 2022 o Visual Studio Code.
- PowerShell.
- Navegador web.
- Microsoft Excel o visor compatible para abrir archivos .xlsx.

Servicios usados localmente:

- SQL Server en Docker.
- MinIO en Docker.
- API .NET.
- Admin Blazor Server.

0 Errores
0 Advertencias

Si aparecen errores, validar:

- Que Docker Desktop estÕ activo.
- Que el SDK de .NET estÕ instalado.
- Que los paquetes NuGet se hayan restaurado correctamente.
- Que las cadenas de conexiµn estÕn configuradas.

13.2 Admin no responde

Validar que estÕ corriendo:

dotnet run --project "src\Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin\Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin.csproj" --urls "http://localhost:5264"

13.3 Error de conexiµn a SQL Server

Validar:

- Docker Desktop activo.
- Contenedor navi-tools-sqlserver activo.
- Puerto 1434 disponible.
- Cadena de conexiµn correcta.

13.4 Error cargando documentos

Validar:

- MinIO activo.
- Bucket navi-tools-documents creado.
- Credenciales correctas.
- Puerto 9100 disponible.

13.5 El documento no aparece como evidencia

Validar:

- Que el documento estÕ activo.
- Que el mantenimiento haya sido editado.
- Que se haya seleccionado el documento en Documento evidencia.
- Que se haya guardado el mantenimiento.

13.6 El filtro de trazabilidad no funciona

Validar:

- Que la pÃgina tenga renderizado interactivo.
- Que Admin haya sido reiniciado.
- Que el navegador no tenga una pestaþa vieja abierta.


14. Comandos ºtiles

Detener procesos:

Get-Process Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
Get-Process Navi.ToolsAssets.Worker -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force

Compilar todo:

Abrir Admin:

Abrir Swagger:

# NAVI Herramientas & Activos  Checklist funcional MVP

## Estado general

- Proyecto: NAVI Herramientas & Activos
- Stack: .NET 8, Blazor Server, Web API, SQL Server, MinIO
- Mµdulo principal: Gestiµn de herramientas, activos y hoja de vida tÕcnica

## Servicios principales

| Servicio | URL |
|---|---|
| API | http://localhost:5218 |
| Admin | http://localhost:5264 |
| MinIO API | http://localhost:9100 |
| MinIO Console | http://localhost:9101 |

## Funcionalidades validadas

### Inventario maestro

- [ ] Carga listado de herramientas.
- [ ] Muestra semÃforos de estado.
- [ ] Filtro por estado.
- [ ] Filtro por sede.
- [ ] Bºsqueda por cµdigo, nombre, serial, sede, tipo o categorÚa.
- [ ] Acceso a detalle.
- [ ] Acceso a hoja de vida tÕcnica.

### Detalle de herramienta

- [ ] Muestra informaciµn general.
- [ ] Permite cambiar estado operativo.
- [ ] Permite marcar herramienta especializada/no especializada.
- [ ] Registra cambios.

### Hoja de vida tÕcnica

- [ ] Muestra informaciµn del equipo.
- [ ] Muestra especificaciones tÕcnicas.
- [ ] Muestra vida ºtil.
- [ ] Muestra plan de mantenimiento.
- [ ] Muestra accesorios.
- [ ] Muestra documentos.
- [ ] Muestra cronograma de mantenimiento.
- [ ] Muestra prÃcticas seguras.
- [ ] Muestra eventos de hoja de vida.
- [ ] Muestra alerta visual de mantenimiento.
- [ ] Exporta a PDF mediante impresiµn.
- [ ] Exporta a Excel `.xlsx`.

### Documentos

- [ ] Carga documentos.
- [ ] Descarga documentos.
- [ ] Elimina documentos.
- [ ] Limpia evidencia asociada cuando se elimina un documento usado por mantenimiento.

### Mantenimientos

- [ ] Crea mantenimiento.
- [ ] Edita mantenimiento.
- [ ] Asocia evidencia documental.
- [ ] Descarga evidencia desde gestiµn de mantenimientos.
- [ ] Muestra evidencia en hoja de vida.

### Accesorios

- [ ] Crea accesorio.
- [ ] Edita accesorio.
- [ ] Desactiva accesorio.

### PrÃcticas seguras

- [ ] Crea prÃctica segura.
- [ ] Edita prÃctica segura.
- [ ] Desactiva prÃctica segura.
- [ ] Carga prÃcticas por defecto.

### Trazabilidad

- [ ] Lista eventos de hoja de vida.
- [ ] Filtra por texto.
- [ ] Filtra por tipo de evento en espaþol.
- [ ] Limpia filtros.

## Evidencias recomendadas

- Captura de inventario maestro.
- Captura de hoja de vida tÕcnica.
- Captura de alerta de mantenimiento.
- Captura de documentos.
- Captura de mantenimiento con evidencia.
- Captura de trazabilidad.
- Archivo Excel exportado.
- PDF generado desde navegador.

## Resultado esperado

El MVP permite administrar herramientas y activos de taller, consultar su hoja de vida tÕcnica, gestionar documentos, mantenimientos, accesorios, prÃcticas seguras y trazabilidad, manteniendo una experiencia visual cercana a un sistema corporativo y alineada al flujo de Dynamics/Fenix365.

ARCHIVO: database\scripts\001-create-database.sql
TAMAîO: 1184 bytes
################################################################################

IF DB_ID(N'NaviToolsAssetsDb') IS NULL
BEGIN
    CREATE DATABASE [NaviToolsAssetsDb];
END
GO

USE [NaviToolsAssetsDb];
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Security')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Security');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Organization')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Organization');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Inventory')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Inventory');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'LifeCycle')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA LifeCycle');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Documents')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Documents');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Loans')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Loans');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Maintenance')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Maintenance');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Imports')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Imports');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Sync')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Sync');
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'Audit')
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA Audit');
GO

ARCHIVO: docker\docker-compose.yml
TAMAîO: 935 bytes
################################################################################

name: navi-tools-assets

services:
  sqlserver:
    image: mcr.microsoft.com/mssql/server:2022-latest
    container_name: navi-tools-sqlserver
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      ACCEPT_EULA: ${ACCEPT_EULA}
      MSSQL_SA_PASSWORD: ${MSSQL_SA_PASSWORD}
      MSSQL_PID: ${MSSQL_PID}
    ports:
      - "1434:1433"
    volumes:
      - navi_sqlserver_data:/var/opt/mssql
    networks:
      - navi_tools_network

  minio:
    image: minio/minio:latest
    container_name: navi-tools-minio
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: server /data --console-address ":9001"
    environment:
      MINIO_ROOT_USER: ${MINIO_ROOT_USER}
      MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD: ${MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD}
    ports:
      - "9100:9000"
      - "9101:9001"
    volumes:
      - navi_minio_data:/data
    networks:
      - navi_tools_network

volumes:
  navi_sqlserver_data:
  navi_minio_data:

networks:
  navi_tools_network:
    driver: bridge

# Configuraciµn segura - NAVI Herramientas

## Objetivo

Definir cµmo se manejarÃn las variables de entorno, cadenas de conexiµn, claves de MinIO, configuraciµn de Hangfire y archivos locales del proyecto NAVI Herramientas.

## Archivos que sÚ pueden subirse al repositorio

- appsettings.json
- docker-compose.yml
- local.env.example
- minio.example.json
- Documentaciµn tÕcnica

## Archivos que NO deben subirse al repositorio

- appsettings.Development.json
- appsettings.Local.json
- appsettings.Production.json
- local.env
- .env
- Archivos con contraseþas, tokens o secretos reales

## Servicios locales

SQL Server:

- Host: localhost
- Puerto: 1434
- Base de datos: NaviToolsAssetsDb

MinIO:

- API: http://localhost:9100
- Consola: http://localhost:9101
- Bucket: navi-tools-documents

Hangfire:

- Dashboard: /hangfire
- Base de datos: NaviToolsAssetsDb
- Esquema: HangFire

## Variables de entorno recomendadas

ConnectionStrings__NaviToolsAssetsDb
Minio__Endpoint
Minio__AccessKey
Minio__SecretKey
Minio__BucketName
Minio__UseSsl
Worker__Name
Hangfire__DashboardPath

## Regla principal

Las credenciales reales deben vivir en user-secrets, variables de entorno del servidor o archivos locales ignorados por Git.
Nunca deben quedar quemadas en archivos versionados.

# Configuraciµn de MinIO - NAVI Herramientas

## Servicio

- Hojas de vida digitales
- Evidencias fotogrÃficas
- Actas de entrega
- Actas de devoluciµn
- Soportes de mantenimiento
- Documentos de baja
- Archivos de importaciµn
- Evidencias de toma fÚsica
- Documentos tÕcnicos

## Estructura lµgica

evidences/
damages/
loans/
returns/
maintenance/
purchases/
disposals/
physical-counts/
imports/

audit/

NAVI Herramientas & Activos  Entrega tÕcnica MVP

1. Resumen ejecutivo

El MVP de NAVI Herramientas & Activos permite gestionar herramientas, activos de taller y su hoja de vida tÕcnica, integrando inventario, documentos, mantenimientos, accesorios, prÃcticas seguras, trazabilidad y exportaciµn de informaciµn.

El sistema fue construido como una soluciµn web basada en .NET 8, con API REST, panel administrativo en Blazor Server, almacenamiento documental en MinIO y persistencia en SQL Server.

El objetivo principal del MVP es demostrar el flujo funcional completo para administrar herramientas de taller, tomando como referencia el comportamiento esperado en Dynamics/Fenix365 y adaptÃndolo a un mµdulo especializado para control operativo, tÕcnico y documental.


2. Stack tecnolµgico

Backend: .NET 8 Web API
Frontend administrativo: Blazor Server
Base de datos: SQL Server
ORM: Entity Framework Core
Documentos: MinIO
Exportaciµn Excel: ClosedXML
Jobs / procesos futuros: Hangfire
Documentaciµn API: Swagger
Control de versiones: Git / GitHub


3. Servicios locales del MVP

API: http://localhost:5218
Admin: http://localhost:5264
MinIO API: http://localhost:9100
MinIO Console: http://localhost:9101


4. Soluciµn y proyectos

NAVI Herramientas & Activos  GuÚa rÃpida para ejecutar el MVP desde cero

1. Objetivo de la guÚa

Esta guÚa explica cµmo levantar el MVP de NAVI Herramientas & Activos en un equipo local, validando API, Admin, base de datos, almacenamiento documental y exportaciµn de hoja de vida tÕcnica.

El objetivo es que otro desarrollador pueda abrir el proyecto, compilarlo y probar el flujo principal del sistema.


2. Requisitos previos

El equipo debe tener instalado:

- .NET SDK 8 o superior.
- Docker Desktop.
- Git.
- Visual Studio 2022 o Visual Studio Code.
- PowerShell.
- Navegador web.
- Microsoft Excel o visor compatible para abrir archivos .xlsx.

Servicios usados localmente:

- SQL Server en Docker.
- MinIO en Docker.
- API .NET.
- Admin Blazor Server.

0 Errores
0 Advertencias

Si aparecen errores, validar:

- Que Docker Desktop estÕ activo.
- Que el SDK de .NET estÕ instalado.
- Que los paquetes NuGet se hayan restaurado correctamente.
- Que las cadenas de conexiµn estÕn configuradas.

13. Problemas comunes

13.1 API no responde

Validar que estÕ corriendo:

dotnet run --project "src\Navi.ToolsAssets.Api\Navi.ToolsAssets.Api.csproj" --urls "http://localhost:5218"

13.2 Admin no responde

Validar que estÕ corriendo:

dotnet run --project "src\Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin\Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin.csproj" --urls "http://localhost:5264"

13.3 Error de conexiµn a SQL Server

Validar:

- Docker Desktop activo.
- Contenedor navi-tools-sqlserver activo.
- Puerto 1434 disponible.
- Cadena de conexiµn correcta.

13.4 Error cargando documentos

Validar:

- MinIO activo.
- Bucket navi-tools-documents creado.
- Credenciales correctas.
- Puerto 9100 disponible.

13.5 El documento no aparece como evidencia

Validar:

- Que el documento estÕ activo.
- Que el mantenimiento haya sido editado.
- Que se haya seleccionado el documento en Documento evidencia.
- Que se haya guardado el mantenimiento.

13.6 El filtro de trazabilidad no funciona

Validar:

- Que la pÃgina tenga renderizado interactivo.
- Que Admin haya sido reiniciado.
- Que el navegador no tenga una pestaþa vieja abierta.


14. Comandos ºtiles

Detener procesos:

Get-Process Navi.ToolsAssets.Api -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
Get-Process Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
Get-Process Navi.ToolsAssets.Worker -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force

Compilar todo:

dotnet build "Navitrans.ToolsAssets.Management.sln"

Abrir Admin:

Start-Process "http://localhost:5264/tools"

Abrir Swagger:

Start-Process "http://localhost:5218/swagger"

# NAVI Herramientas & Activos  Checklist funcional MVP

## Estado general

- Proyecto: NAVI Herramientas & Activos
- Stack: .NET 8, Blazor Server, Web API, SQL Server, MinIO
- Mµdulo principal: Gestiµn de herramientas, activos y hoja de vida tÕcnica

## Servicios principales

| Servicio | URL |
|---|---|
| API | http://localhost:5218 |
| Admin | http://localhost:5264 |
| MinIO API | http://localhost:9100 |
| MinIO Console | http://localhost:9101 |

## Funcionalidades validadas

### Inventario maestro

- [ ] Carga listado de herramientas.
- [ ] Muestra semÃforos de estado.
- [ ] Filtro por estado.
- [ ] Filtro por sede.
- [ ] Bºsqueda por cµdigo, nombre, serial, sede, tipo o categorÚa.
- [ ] Acceso a detalle.
- [ ] Acceso a hoja de vida tÕcnica.

### Detalle de herramienta

- [ ] Muestra informaciµn general.
- [ ] Permite cambiar estado operativo.
- [ ] Permite marcar herramienta especializada/no especializada.
- [ ] Registra cambios.

### Hoja de vida tÕcnica

- [ ] Muestra informaciµn del equipo.
- [ ] Muestra especificaciones tÕcnicas.
- [ ] Muestra vida ºtil.
- [ ] Muestra plan de mantenimiento.
- [ ] Muestra accesorios.
- [ ] Muestra documentos.
- [ ] Muestra cronograma de mantenimiento.
- [ ] Muestra prÃcticas seguras.
- [ ] Muestra eventos de hoja de vida.
- [ ] Muestra alerta visual de mantenimiento.
- [ ] Exporta a PDF mediante impresiµn.
- [ ] Exporta a Excel `.xlsx`.

### Documentos

- [ ] Carga documentos.
- [ ] Descarga documentos.
- [ ] Elimina documentos.
- [ ] Limpia evidencia asociada cuando se elimina un documento usado por mantenimiento.

### Mantenimientos

- [ ] Crea mantenimiento.
- [ ] Edita mantenimiento.
- [ ] Asocia evidencia documental.
- [ ] Descarga evidencia desde gestiµn de mantenimientos.
- [ ] Muestra evidencia en hoja de vida.

### Accesorios

- [ ] Crea accesorio.
- [ ] Edita accesorio.
- [ ] Desactiva accesorio.

### PrÃcticas seguras

- [ ] Crea prÃctica segura.
- [ ] Edita prÃctica segura.
- [ ] Desactiva prÃctica segura.
- [ ] Carga prÃcticas por defecto.

### Trazabilidad

- [ ] Lista eventos de hoja de vida.
- [ ] Filtra por texto.
- [ ] Filtra por tipo de evento en espaþol.
- [ ] Limpia filtros.

## Evidencias recomendadas

- Captura de inventario maestro.
- Captura de hoja de vida tÕcnica.
- Captura de alerta de mantenimiento.
- Captura de documentos.
- Captura de mantenimiento con evidencia.
- Captura de trazabilidad.
- Archivo Excel exportado.
- PDF generado desde navegador.

## Resultado esperado

El MVP permite administrar herramientas y activos de taller, consultar su hoja de vida tÕcnica, gestionar documentos, mantenimientos, accesorios, prÃcticas seguras y trazabilidad, manteniendo una experiencia visual cercana a un sistema corporativo y alineada al flujo de Dynamics/Fenix365.

# NAVI Herramientas

Sistema de Gestiµn de Herramientas, Activos Operativos, Hojas de Vida, Inventario y Mantenimiento.

## Proyecto

Nombre funcional:

NAVI Herramientas

Nombre tÕcnico:

Navitrans.ToolsAssets.Management

## Stack tecnolµgico

- .NET 8 Web API
- Blazor Server
- PWA
- SQL Server
- Docker
- MinIO
- Hangfire
- JWT / Microsoft Entra ID

## Estructura

- src: proyectos principales
- tests: pruebas unitarias e integraciµn
- database: scripts y migraciones
- docs: documentaciµn funcional y tÕcnica
- docker: configuraciµn de contenedores

@using System.Diagnostics

@if (ShowRequestId)
{
    <p>
        <strong>Request ID:</strong> <code>@RequestId</code>
    </p>
}

<h3>Development Mode</h3>
<p>
    Swapping to <strong>Development</strong> environment will display more detailed information about the error that occurred.
</p>
<p>
    <strong>The Development environment shouldn't be enabled for deployed applications.</strong>
    It can result in displaying sensitive information from exceptions to end users.
    For local debugging, enable the <strong>Development</strong> environment by setting the <strong>ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT</strong> environment variable to <strong>Development</strong>
    and restarting the app.
</p>

@code{
    [CascadingParameter]
    private HttpContext? HttpContext { get; set; }

    private string? RequestId { get; set; }
    private bool ShowRequestId => !string.IsNullOrEmpty(RequestId);

    protected override void OnInitialized() =>
        RequestId = Activity.Current?.Id ?? HttpContext?.TraceIdentifier;
}

@page "/"
@rendermode InteractiveServer
@inject IHttpClientFactory HttpClientFactory

<PageTitle>NAVI Herramientas - Dashboard</PageTitle>

<div class="dashboard-header">
    <div>
        <h1>NAVI Herramientas</h1>
        <p>Dashboard operativo de herramientas, activos, inventario fÚsico, prÕstamos, mantenimiento y conciliaciµn.</p>
    </div>

    <button class="btn btn-primary" @onclick="LoadDashboardAsync" disabled="@isLoading">
        @(isLoading ? "Actualizando..." : "Actualizar")
    </button>
</div>

@if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(errorMessage))
{
    <div class="alert alert-danger">
        <strong>Error:</strong> @errorMessage
    </div>
}

{

    </div>
}
else if (summary is not null)

        <div class="kpi-card">

        <div class="kpi-card">

                    @foreach (var branch in toolsByBranch.Where(x => x.TotalTools > 0))

                        var percent = GetBarPercent(branch.TotalTools, GetMaxBranchToolCount());

                        <div class="bar-row">

                            </div>

                                Prestadas: @branch.LoanedTools |
                                Mantenimiento: @branch.InMaintenanceTools |

@code {
    private bool isLoading;
    private string? errorMessage;

    private DashboardSummary? summary;
    private List<ToolsByStatusItem> toolsByStatus = new();
    private List<ToolsByBranchItem> toolsByBranch = new();
    private List<DashboardAlert> alerts = new();
    private List<RecentActivityItem> recentActivity = new();

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadDashboardAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadDashboardAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            isLoading = true;
            errorMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            summary = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<DashboardSummary>("api/dashboard/summary");
            toolsByStatus = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<List<ToolsByStatusItem>>("api/dashboard/tools-by-status") ?? new();
            toolsByBranch = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<List<ToolsByBranchItem>>("api/dashboard/tools-by-branch") ?? new();
            alerts = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<List<DashboardAlert>>("api/dashboard/alerts") ?? new();
            recentActivity = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<List<RecentActivityItem>>("api/dashboard/recent-activity") ?? new();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo cargar el dashboard. Valida que la API estÕ activa en http://localhost:5218. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private int GetMaxStatusCount()
    {
        return toolsByStatus.Count == 0 ? 1 : Math.Max(1, toolsByStatus.Max(x => x.Count));
    }

    private int GetMaxBranchToolCount()
    {
        return toolsByBranch.Count == 0 ? 1 : Math.Max(1, toolsByBranch.Max(x => x.TotalTools));
    }

    private static int GetBarPercent(int value, int maxValue)
    {
        if (value <= 0 || maxValue <= 0)
        {
            return 0;
        }

        return Math.Max(4, (int)Math.Round((decimal)value / maxValue * 100));
    }

    private sealed class DashboardSummary
    {
        public int TotalTools { get; set; }
        public int AvailableTools { get; set; }
        public int LoanedTools { get; set; }
        public int InMaintenanceTools { get; set; }
        public int DamagedTools { get; set; }
        public int NotSuitableTools { get; set; }
        public int NotLocatedTools { get; set; }
        public int PendingValidationTools { get; set; }
        public int DisposedTools { get; set; }
        public int SpecializedTools { get; set; }
        public int NonSpecializedTools { get; set; }
        public int ReconciledTools { get; set; }
        public int InconsistentTools { get; set; }
        public int SyncErrorTools { get; set; }
        public int PendingSyncTools { get; set; }
        public DateTime LastUpdatedAt { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class ToolsByStatusItem
    {
        public string Status { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string StatusLabel { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int Count { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class ToolsByBranchItem
    {
        public string BranchCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string BranchName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? ZoneCode { get; set; }
        public string? ZoneName { get; set; }
        public int TotalTools { get; set; }
        public int AvailableTools { get; set; }
        public int LoanedTools { get; set; }
        public int InMaintenanceTools { get; set; }
        public int DamagedTools { get; set; }
        public int NotLocatedTools { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class DashboardAlert
    {
        public string Type { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Severity { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public Guid ToolId { get; set; }
        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Status { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Message { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public DateTime Date { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class RecentActivityItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public Guid ToolAssetId { get; set; }
        public string? ToolInternalCode { get; set; }
        public string? ToolName { get; set; }
        public string EventType { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Title { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? PreviousValue { get; set; }
        public string? NewValue { get; set; }
        public DateTime EventDate { get; set; }
        public string? PerformedBy { get; set; }
    }
}

                            <span>@doc.DocumentType</span>
                        </a>
                    }

@code {
    private string GetMaintenanceAlertClass()
    {
        var days = GetDaysUntilNextMaintenance();

        if (!days.HasValue)
        {
            return "maintenance-alert maintenance-alert-neutral";
        }

        if (days.Value < 0)
        {
            return "maintenance-alert maintenance-alert-danger";
        }

        if (days.Value <= 30)
        {
            return "maintenance-alert maintenance-alert-warning";
        }

        return "maintenance-alert maintenance-alert-success";
    }

    private string GetMaintenanceAlertTitle()
    {
        var days = GetDaysUntilNextMaintenance();

        if (!days.HasValue)
        {
            return "Sin fecha programada";
        }

        if (days.Value < 0)
        {
            return "Mantenimiento vencido";
        }

        if (days.Value <= 30)
        {
            return "Mantenimiento prµximo";
        }

        return "Mantenimiento al dÚa";
    }

    private string GetMaintenanceAlertDescription()
    {
        var days = GetDaysUntilNextMaintenance();

        if (!days.HasValue)
        {
            return "La herramienta no tiene una fecha de prµximo mantenimiento registrada.";
        }

        if (days.Value < 0)
        {
            return $"El mantenimiento estÃ vencido hace {Math.Abs(days.Value)} dÚa(s).";
        }

        if (days.Value == 0)
        {
            return "El mantenimiento estÃ programado para hoy.";
        }

        if (days.Value <= 30)
        {
            return $"El mantenimiento estÃ prµximo. Faltan {days.Value} dÚa(s).";
        }

        return $"La herramienta se encuentra al dÚa. Faltan {days.Value} dÚa(s) para el prµximo mantenimiento.";
    }

    private string GetMaintenanceDaysText()
    {
        var days = GetDaysUntilNextMaintenance();

        if (!days.HasValue)
        {
            return "-";
        }

        return days.Value < 0
            ? $"Vencido {Math.Abs(days.Value)} dÚa(s)"
            : $"{days.Value} dÚa(s)";
    }

    private int? GetDaysUntilNextMaintenance()
    {
        if (record?.MaintenancePlan?.NextMaintenanceDate is null)
        {
            return null;
        }

        var next = record.MaintenancePlan.NextMaintenanceDate.Value.Date;
        var today = DateTime.Today;

        return (next - today).Days;
    }

    private static string ShowDate(DateTime? value)
    {
        return value.HasValue
            ? value.Value.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy")
            : "-";
    }

    [Parameter]
    public Guid ToolId { get; set; }

    private bool isLoading;
    private string? errorMessage;
    private TechnicalLifeRecordModel? record;

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            isLoading = true;
            errorMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            record = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<TechnicalLifeRecordModel>($"api/tools/{ToolId}/technical-life-record");
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo cargar la hoja de vida tÕcnica. Valida que la API estÕ activa en http://localhost:5218. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private void GoBack()
    {
        NavigationManager.NavigateTo("/tools");
    }

    private string BuildApiUrl(string? relativeUrl)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(relativeUrl))
        {
            return "#";
        }

        if (relativeUrl.StartsWith("http", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            return relativeUrl;
        }

        var baseUrl = Configuration["NaviApi:BaseUrl"] ?? "http://localhost:5218";

        return $"{baseUrl.TrimEnd('/')}/{relativeUrl.TrimStart('/')}";
    }

    private async Task PrintLifeRecord()
    {
        await JsRuntime.InvokeVoidAsync("window.print");
    }

    private static string Show(string? value)
    {
        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "-" : value;
    }

    private static string NumberText(int? value)
    {
        return value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToString() : "-";
    }

    private static string BoolText(bool? value)
    {
        return value.HasValue ? BoolText(value.Value) : "-";
    }

    private static string BoolText(bool value)
    {
        return value ? "SÚ" : "No";
    }

    private static string DateText(DateTime? value)
    {
        return value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy") : "-";
    }

    private static string DateTimeText(DateTime? value)
    {
        return value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm") : "-";
    }

    private static int GetPercent(int? value)
    {
        return Math.Clamp(value ?? 0, 0, 100);
    }

    private static string GetStatusLabel(string? status)
    {
        return status switch
        {
            "Available" => "Disponible",
            "Assigned" => "Asignada",
            "Loaned" => "Prestada",
            "InMaintenance" => "En mantenimiento",
            "Damaged" => "Daþada",
            "NotSuitable" => "No apta",
            "PendingValidation" => "Pendiente validaciµn",
            "Inconsistent" => "Inconsistente",
            "NotLocated" => "No localizada",
            "PendingDisposal" => "Pendiente de baja",
            "Disposed" => "Dada de baja",
            _ => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(status) ? "Sin estado" : status
        };
    }

    private static string GetStatusBadgeClass(string? status)
    {
        return status switch
        {
            "Available" => "badge bg-success",
            "PendingValidation" => "badge bg-warning text-dark",
            "Loaned" => "badge bg-info text-dark",
            "InMaintenance" => "badge bg-primary",
            "Damaged" => "badge bg-danger",
            "NotSuitable" => "badge bg-danger",
            "NotLocated" => "badge bg-dark",
            "Inconsistent" => "badge bg-danger",
            "Disposed" => "badge bg-secondary",
            _ => "badge bg-secondary"
        };
    }

    private sealed class TechnicalLifeRecordModel
    {
        public SummaryInfo Summary { get; set; } = new();
        public EquipmentInfo EquipmentInformation { get; set; } = new();
        public TechnicalInfo TechnicalSpecifications { get; set; } = new();
        public WarrantyInfo Warranty { get; set; } = new();
        public UsefulLifeInfo UsefulLife { get; set; } = new();
        public MaintenancePlanInfo MaintenancePlan { get; set; } = new();
        public List<AccessoryInfo> Accessories { get; set; } = new();
        public List<SafePracticeInfo> SafePractices { get; set; } = new();
        public DocumentGroupInfo Documents { get; set; } = new();
        public List<MaintenanceScheduleInfo> MaintenanceSchedule { get; set; } = new();
        public List<LifeCycleEventInfo> LifeCycleEvents { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class SummaryInfo
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string OperationalStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string PhysicalStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string CustodyStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string ReconciliationStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string SyncStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public bool IsSpecialized { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresPreOperationalCheck { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresCertification { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class EquipmentInfo
    {
        public string? InternalCode { get; set; }
        public string? Name { get; set; }
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? Brand { get; set; }
        public string? Model { get; set; }
        public string? SerialNumber { get; set; }

        public string? FenixCode { get; set; }

        public decimal Quantity { get; set; }
        public string? ZoneCode { get; set; }
        public string? ZoneName { get; set; }
        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? BranchName { get; set; }
        public string? LocationCode { get; set; }
        public string? LocationName { get; set; }

        public string? ToolTypeCode { get; set; }
        public string? ToolTypeName { get; set; }
        public string? ToolCategoryCode { get; set; }
        public string? ToolCategoryName { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class TechnicalInfo
    {
        public string? Voltage { get; set; }
        public string? LoadCapacity { get; set; }
        public string? Provider { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresPreOperationalCheck { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresCertification { get; set; }
        public DateTime? CertificationExpirationDate { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class WarrantyInfo
    {
        public bool HasWarranty { get; set; }
        public string? WarrantyType { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class UsefulLifeInfo
    {
        public DateTime? StartDate { get; set; }
        public DateTime? EndDate { get; set; }
        public int? UsefulLifeMonths { get; set; }
        public int? UsefulLifeDays { get; set; }
        public int? ElapsedDays { get; set; }
        public int? RemainingDays { get; set; }
        public int? UsedPercentage { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class MaintenancePlanInfo
    {
        public DateTime? LastMaintenanceDate { get; set; }
        public DateTime? NextMaintenanceDate { get; set; }
        public int? MaintenancePeriodMonths { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }
        public int TotalMaintenanceRecords { get; set; }
        public int CompletedMaintenanceRecords { get; set; }
        public int PendingMaintenanceRecords { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class AccessoryInfo
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int Quantity { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }
        public bool IsMeasurementEquipment { get; set; }

    }

    private sealed class SafePracticeInfo
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string PracticeName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Description { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int SortOrder { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class DocumentGroupInfo
    {
        public List<DocumentInfo> PhotoRecords { get; set; } = new();
        public List<DocumentInfo> TechnicalDocuments { get; set; } = new();
        public List<DocumentInfo> MaintenanceEvidences { get; set; } = new();
        public List<DocumentInfo> AllDocuments { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class DocumentInfo
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string DocumentType { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string FileName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? ContentType { get; set; }

        public DateTime UploadedAt { get; set; }
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? DownloadUrl { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class MaintenanceScheduleInfo
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string MaintenanceNumber { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Type { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Status { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public DateTime? ScheduledAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? StartedAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? FinishedAt { get; set; }
        public string? Provider { get; set; }
        public string? Technician { get; set; }
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? MaintenanceActivities { get; set; }
        public string? ExecutionNotes { get; set; }
        public string? InvoiceNumber { get; set; }
        public Guid? EvidenceDocumentId { get; set; }
        public string? EvidenceFileName { get; set; }
        public string? EvidenceDownloadUrl { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsibleName { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsiblePosition { get; set; }
        public bool? IsToolOperational { get; set; }
        public decimal? Cost { get; set; }
        public string? Result { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class LifeCycleEventInfo
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string EventType { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Title { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? PreviousValue { get; set; }
        public string? NewValue { get; set; }
        public string? PerformedBy { get; set; }
        public DateTime? EventDate { get; set; }
    }
}

@code {
    [Parameter]
    public Guid ToolId { get; set; }

    private bool isLoading;
    private bool isSaving;
    private string? errorMessage;
    private string? successMessage;
    private string internalCode = string.Empty;
    private string toolName = string.Empty;
    private TechnicalEditModel? editModel;

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            isLoading = true;
            errorMessage = null;
            successMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            var record = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<TechnicalLifeRecordForEditModel>($"api/tools/{ToolId}/technical-life-record");

            if (record is null)
            {
                errorMessage = "No se encontrµ informaciµn tÕcnica para la herramienta.";
                return;
            }

            internalCode = record.Summary.InternalCode;
            toolName = record.Summary.Name;

            editModel = new TechnicalEditModel
            {
                Brand = record.EquipmentInformation.Brand,
                Model = record.EquipmentInformation.Model,
                SerialNumber = record.EquipmentInformation.SerialNumber,
                FixedAssetCode = record.EquipmentInformation.FixedAssetCode,
                FenixCode = record.EquipmentInformation.FenixCode,
                AcquisitionDate = record.EquipmentInformation.AcquisitionDate?.Date,

                Voltage = record.TechnicalSpecifications.Voltage,
                LoadCapacity = record.TechnicalSpecifications.LoadCapacity,
                Provider = record.TechnicalSpecifications.Provider,
                RequiresMaintenance = record.TechnicalSpecifications.RequiresMaintenance,
                RequiresPreOperationalCheck = record.TechnicalSpecifications.RequiresPreOperationalCheck,
                RequiresCertification = record.TechnicalSpecifications.RequiresCertification,
                CertificationExpirationDate = record.TechnicalSpecifications.CertificationExpirationDate?.Date,

                HasWarranty = record.Warranty.HasWarranty,
                WarrantyType = record.Warranty.WarrantyType,

                UsefulLifeStartDate = record.UsefulLife.StartDate?.Date,
                UsefulLifeMonths = record.UsefulLife.UsefulLifeMonths,
                UsefulLifeDays = record.UsefulLife.UsefulLifeDays,

                LastMaintenanceDate = record.MaintenancePlan.LastMaintenanceDate?.Date,
                NextMaintenanceDate = record.MaintenancePlan.NextMaintenanceDate?.Date,
                MaintenancePeriodMonths = record.MaintenancePlan.MaintenancePeriodMonths,

                UpdatedBy = "yquinto",
                Observation = "Actualizaciµn de datos tÕcnicos desde Admin."
            };
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo cargar la informaciµn tÕcnica. Valida que la API estÕ activa. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task SaveAsync()
    {
        if (editModel is null)
        {
            return;
        }

        try
        {
            isSaving = true;
            errorMessage = null;
            successMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            var response = await client.PatchAsJsonAsync($"api/tools/{ToolId}/technical-data", editModel);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var detail = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                errorMessage = $"No se pudieron actualizar los datos tÕcnicos. Cµdigo: {(int)response.StatusCode}. Detalle: {detail}";
                return;
            }

            successMessage = "Datos tÕcnicos actualizados correctamente.";
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudieron actualizar los datos tÕcnicos. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isSaving = false;
        }
    }

    private void GoBack()
    {
        NavigationManager.NavigateTo($"/tools/{ToolId}/technical-life-record");
    }

    private sealed class TechnicalEditModel
    {
        public string? Brand { get; set; }
        public string? Model { get; set; }
        public string? SerialNumber { get; set; }
        public string? FixedAssetCode { get; set; }
        public string? FenixCode { get; set; }
        public DateTime? AcquisitionDate { get; set; }
        public string? Voltage { get; set; }
        public string? LoadCapacity { get; set; }
        public string? Provider { get; set; }
        public bool HasWarranty { get; set; }
        public string? WarrantyType { get; set; }
        public DateTime? UsefulLifeStartDate { get; set; }
        public int? UsefulLifeMonths { get; set; }
        public int? UsefulLifeDays { get; set; }
        public DateTime? LastMaintenanceDate { get; set; }
        public DateTime? NextMaintenanceDate { get; set; }
        public int? MaintenancePeriodMonths { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresPreOperationalCheck { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresCertification { get; set; }
        public DateTime? CertificationExpirationDate { get; set; }
        public string? UpdatedBy { get; set; }
        public string? Observation { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class TechnicalLifeRecordForEditModel
    {
        public SummaryInfo Summary { get; set; } = new();
        public EquipmentInfo EquipmentInformation { get; set; } = new();
        public TechnicalInfo TechnicalSpecifications { get; set; } = new();
        public WarrantyInfo Warranty { get; set; } = new();
        public UsefulLifeInfo UsefulLife { get; set; } = new();
        public MaintenancePlanInfo MaintenancePlan { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class SummaryInfo
    {
        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    private sealed class EquipmentInfo
    {
        public string? Brand { get; set; }
        public string? Model { get; set; }
        public string? SerialNumber { get; set; }
        public string? FixedAssetCode { get; set; }
        public string? FenixCode { get; set; }
        public DateTime? AcquisitionDate { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class TechnicalInfo
    {
        public string? Voltage { get; set; }
        public string? LoadCapacity { get; set; }
        public string? Provider { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresPreOperationalCheck { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresCertification { get; set; }
        public DateTime? CertificationExpirationDate { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class WarrantyInfo
    {
        public bool HasWarranty { get; set; }
        public string? WarrantyType { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class UsefulLifeInfo
    {
        public DateTime? StartDate { get; set; }
        public int? UsefulLifeMonths { get; set; }
        public int? UsefulLifeDays { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class MaintenancePlanInfo
    {
        public DateTime? LastMaintenanceDate { get; set; }
        public DateTime? NextMaintenanceDate { get; set; }
        public int? MaintenancePeriodMonths { get; set; }
    }
}



################################################################################
ARCHIVO: src\Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin\Components\Pages\ToolAccessoriesManage.razor

@page "/tools/{ToolId:guid}/accessories"
@rendermode InteractiveServer
@using System.Net.Http.Json
@inject IHttpClientFactory HttpClientFactory
@inject NavigationManager NavigationManager

<PageTitle>Accesorios - NAVI Herramientas</PageTitle>

<div class="page-header">
    <div>
        <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm mb-2" @onclick="GoBack">
            ? Volver a hoja de vida
        </button>

        <h1>Gestiµn de accesorios</h1>
        <p>Agrega, edita o desactiva accesorios asociados a la herramienta.</p>
    </div>

    <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" @onclick="LoadAsync" disabled="@isLoading">
        @(isLoading ? "Cargando..." : "Recargar")
    </button>
</div>

@if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(errorMessage))
{
    <div class="alert alert-danger">
        <strong>Error:</strong> @errorMessage
    </div>
}

@if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(successMessage))
{
    <div class="alert alert-success">
        @successMessage
    </div>
}

<section class="life-record-cover">
    <div>
        <span class="life-record-label">Accesorios</span>
        <h2>@toolName</h2>
        <p>@internalCode</p>
    </div>

    <div class="life-record-cover-status">
        <span class="badge bg-light text-dark">@accessories.Count accesorio(s)</span>
    </div>
</section>

<div class="accessories-manage-grid">
    <section class="life-record-section">
        <div class="section-title">
            <span>1</span>
            <h2>@(editingAccessoryId.HasValue ? "Editar accesorio" : "Nuevo accesorio")</h2>
        </div>

        <EditForm Model="formModel" OnValidSubmit="SaveAsync">
            <div class="edit-form-grid">
                <div>
                    <label>Nombre del accesorio</label>
                    <InputText class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.Name" placeholder="Ej: CARGADOR" />
                </div>

                <div>
                    <label>Cantidad</label>
                    <InputNumber class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.Quantity" />
                </div>

                <div class="form-check-row">
                    <InputCheckbox class="form-check-input" @bind-Value="formModel.RequiresMaintenance" />
                    <label>Requiere mantenimiento</label>
                </div>

                <div class="form-check-row">
                    <InputCheckbox class="form-check-input" @bind-Value="formModel.IsMeasurementEquipment" />
                    <label>Equipo de mediciµn</label>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="mt-3">
                <label>Observaciµn</label>
                <InputTextArea class="form-control technical-observation"
                               @bind-Value="formModel.Observation"
                               placeholder="Observaciµn del accesorio..." />
            </div>

            <div class="technical-edit-actions static-actions mt-3">
                @if (editingAccessoryId.HasValue)
                {
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" @onclick="CancelEdit">
                        Cancelar ediciµn
                    </button>
                }

                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary" disabled="@isSaving">
                    @(isSaving ? "Guardando..." : editingAccessoryId.HasValue ? "Actualizar accesorio" : "Crear accesorio")
                </button>
            </div>
        </EditForm>
    </section>

    <section class="life-record-section">

        </div>

        {
            <div class="alert alert-info mb-0">Cargando accesorios...</div>
        }
        else if (accessories.Count == 0)
        {
            <p class="text-muted mb-0">No hay accesorios registrados para esta herramienta.</p>
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="table-responsive">
                <table class="table table-sm table-bordered excel-table align-middle">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Accesorio</th>
                            <th>Cantidad</th>
                            <th>Mantenimiento</th>

                            <tr>

                                <td>
                                    <div class="d-flex gap-1 flex-wrap">

                                            Editar
                                        </button>

                                        <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger" @onclick="() => DeleteAsync(item)">
                                            Desactivar
                                        </button>
                                    </div>

                </table>

@code {
    [Parameter]
    public Guid ToolId { get; set; }

    private bool isLoading;
    private bool isSaving;
    private string? errorMessage;
    private string? successMessage;
    private string internalCode = string.Empty;
    private string toolName = string.Empty;
    private Guid? editingAccessoryId;

    private AccessoryFormModel formModel = new();
    private List<AccessoryItemModel> accessories = new();

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            isLoading = true;
            errorMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            var record = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<TechnicalLifeRecordHeaderModel>($"api/tools/{ToolId}/technical-life-record");

            if (record is not null)
            {
                internalCode = record.Summary.InternalCode;
                toolName = record.Summary.Name;
            }

            accessories = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<List<AccessoryItemModel>>($"api/tools/{ToolId}/accessories") ?? new();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudieron cargar los accesorios. Valida que la API estÕ activa. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task SaveAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            isSaving = true;
            errorMessage = null;
            successMessage = null;

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.Name))
            {
                errorMessage = "El nombre del accesorio es obligatorio.";
                return;
            }

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            HttpResponseMessage response;

            if (editingAccessoryId.HasValue)
            {
                var payload = new
                {
                    name = formModel.Name,
                    quantity = formModel.Quantity <= 0 ? 1 : formModel.Quantity,
                    requiresMaintenance = formModel.RequiresMaintenance,
                    isMeasurementEquipment = formModel.IsMeasurementEquipment,
                    observation = formModel.Observation,
                    updatedBy = "yquinto"
                };

                response = await client.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/tools/accessories/{editingAccessoryId.Value}", payload);
            }
            else
            {
                var payload = new
                {
                    name = formModel.Name,
                    quantity = formModel.Quantity <= 0 ? 1 : formModel.Quantity,
                    requiresMaintenance = formModel.RequiresMaintenance,
                    isMeasurementEquipment = formModel.IsMeasurementEquipment,
                    observation = formModel.Observation,
                    createdBy = "yquinto"
                };

                response = await client.PostAsJsonAsync($"api/tools/{ToolId}/accessories", payload);
            }

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var detail = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                errorMessage = $"No se pudo guardar el accesorio. Cµdigo: {(int)response.StatusCode}. Detalle: {detail}";
                return;
            }

            successMessage = editingAccessoryId.HasValue
                ? "Accesorio actualizado correctamente."
                : "Accesorio creado correctamente.";

            CancelEdit();
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo guardar el accesorio. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isSaving = false;
        }
    }

    private void StartEdit(AccessoryItemModel item)
    {
        editingAccessoryId = item.Id;

        formModel = new AccessoryFormModel
        {
            Name = item.Name,
            Quantity = item.Quantity,
            RequiresMaintenance = item.RequiresMaintenance,
            IsMeasurementEquipment = item.IsMeasurementEquipment,
            Observation = item.Observation
        };

        successMessage = null;
        errorMessage = null;
    }

    private void CancelEdit()
    {
        editingAccessoryId = null;

        formModel = new AccessoryFormModel
        {
            Quantity = 1
        };
    }

    private async Task DeleteAsync(AccessoryItemModel item)
    {
        try
        {
            isSaving = true;
            errorMessage = null;
            successMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            var response = await client.DeleteAsync($"api/tools/accessories/{item.Id}?deletedBy=yquinto");

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var detail = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                errorMessage = $"No se pudo desactivar el accesorio. Cµdigo: {(int)response.StatusCode}. Detalle: {detail}";
                return;
            }

            successMessage = $"Accesorio desactivado correctamente: {item.Name}.";

            if (editingAccessoryId == item.Id)
            {
                CancelEdit();
            }

            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo desactivar el accesorio. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isSaving = false;
        }
    }

    private void GoBack()
    {
        NavigationManager.NavigateTo($"/tools/{ToolId}/technical-life-record");
    }

    private static string Show(string? value)
    {
        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "-" : value;
    }

    private static string BoolText(bool value)
    {
        return value ? "SÚ" : "No";
    }

    private sealed class AccessoryFormModel
    {
        public string? Name { get; set; }

        public int Quantity { get; set; } = 1;

        public bool RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }

        public bool IsMeasurementEquipment { get; set; }

        public string? Observation { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class AccessoryItemModel
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }

        public Guid ToolAssetId { get; set; }

        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public int Quantity { get; set; }

        public bool RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }

        public bool IsMeasurementEquipment { get; set; }

        public string? Observation { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class TechnicalLifeRecordHeaderModel
    {
        public SummaryInfo Summary { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class SummaryInfo
    {
        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }
}

                    <strong>@FormatDate(tool.CertificationExpirationDate)</strong>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>
    </div>

    <section class="tool-detail-panel">
        <h2>Hoja de vida / Actividad reciente</h2>

        @if (lifeCycleEvents.Count == 0)
        {
            <p class="text-muted">Esta herramienta aºn no tiene eventos registrados.</p>
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="timeline">
                @foreach (var item in lifeCycleEvents.OrderByDescending(x => x.EventDate))
                {
                    <div class="timeline-item">
                        <div class="timeline-dot"></div>

                        <div class="timeline-content">
                            <div class="timeline-header">
                                <strong>@item.Title</strong>
                                <span>@item.EventDate.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm")</span>
                            </div>

                            <small class="text-muted">@item.EventType</small>

                            @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(item.Description))
                            {
                                <p>@item.Description</p>
                            }

                            <div class="timeline-values">
                                <span>Anterior: @ShowValue(item.PreviousValue)</span>
                                <span>Nuevo: @ShowValue(item.NewValue)</span>
                                <span>Usuario: @ShowValue(item.PerformedBy)</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                }
            </div>
        }
    </section>
}

@code {
    [Parameter]
    public Guid ToolId { get; set; }

    private bool isLoading;
    private bool isSaving;
    private string? actionMessage;
    private string selectedOperationalStatus = "PendingValidation";
    private string actionObservation = string.Empty;
    private string? errorMessage;
    private ToolDetailItem? tool;
    private List<LifeCycleEventItem> lifeCycleEvents = new();

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            isLoading = true;
            errorMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            tool = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<ToolDetailItem>($"api/tools/{ToolId}");

            if (tool is not null)
            {
                selectedOperationalStatus = tool!.OperationalStatus;
            }
            lifeCycleEvents = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<List<LifeCycleEventItem>>($"api/tools/{ToolId}/life-cycle-events") ?? new();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo cargar el detalle. Valida que la API estÕ activa en http://localhost:5218. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task ChangeOperationalStatusAsync()
    {
        if (tool is null)
        {
            return;
        }

        try
        {
            isSaving = true;
            actionMessage = null;
            errorMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            var payload = new
            {
                operationalStatus = selectedOperationalStatus,
                changedBy = "yquinto",
                updatedBy = "yquinto",
                reason = actionObservation,
                observation = actionObservation
            };

            var response = await client.PatchAsJsonAsync($"api/tools/{tool.Id}/operational-status", payload);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var detail = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                errorMessage = $"No se pudo cambiar el estado. Cµdigo: {(int)response.StatusCode}. Detalle: {detail}";
                return;
            }

            actionMessage = "Estado operativo actualizado correctamente.";
            actionObservation = string.Empty;

            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo cambiar el estado. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isSaving = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task ToggleSpecializedAsync()
    {
        if (tool is null)
        {
            return;
        }

        try
        {
            isSaving = true;
            actionMessage = null;
            errorMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            var payload = new
            {
                isSpecialized = !tool.IsSpecialized,
                changedBy = "yquinto",
                updatedBy = "yquinto",
                reason = "Cambio de clasificaciµn desde Admin."
            };

            var response = await client.PatchAsJsonAsync($"api/tools/{tool.Id}/classification", payload);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var detail = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                errorMessage = $"No se pudo cambiar la clasificaciµn. Cµdigo: {(int)response.StatusCode}. Detalle: {detail}";
                return;
            }

            actionMessage = "Clasificaciµn actualizada correctamente.";

            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo cambiar la clasificaciµn. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isSaving = false;
        }
    }
    private void GoBack()
    {
        NavigationManager.NavigateTo("/tools");
    }

    private static string ShowValue(string? value)
    {
        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "-" : value;
    }

    private static string BoolLabel(bool value)
    {
        return value ? "SÚ" : "No";
    }

    private static string FormatDate(DateTime? value)
    {
        return value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy") : "-";
    }

    private static string GetStatusLabel(string? status)
    {
        return status switch
        {
            "Available" => "Disponible",
            "Assigned" => "Asignada",
            "Loaned" => "Prestada",
            "InMaintenance" => "En mantenimiento",
            "Damaged" => "Daþada",
            "NotSuitable" => "No apta",
            "PendingValidation" => "Pendiente validaciµn",
            "Inconsistent" => "Inconsistente",
            "NotLocated" => "No localizada",
            "PendingDisposal" => "Pendiente de baja",
            "Disposed" => "Dada de baja",
            _ => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(status) ? "Sin estado" : status
        };
    }

    private static string GetStatusBadgeClass(string? status)
    {
        return status switch
        {
            "Available" => "badge bg-success",
            "PendingValidation" => "badge bg-warning text-dark",
            "Loaned" => "badge bg-info text-dark",
            "InMaintenance" => "badge bg-primary",
            "Damaged" => "badge bg-danger",
            "NotSuitable" => "badge bg-danger",
            "NotLocated" => "badge bg-dark",
            "Inconsistent" => "badge bg-danger",
            "Disposed" => "badge bg-secondary",
            _ => "badge bg-secondary"
        };
    }

    private sealed class ToolDetailItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? Brand { get; set; }
        public string? Model { get; set; }
        public string? SerialNumber { get; set; }
        public string? FixedAssetCode { get; set; }
        public string? FenixCode { get; set; }
        public string? UnitOfMeasure { get; set; }
        public decimal Quantity { get; set; }
        public bool IsSpecialized { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresMaintenance { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresPreOperationalCheck { get; set; }
        public bool RequiresCertification { get; set; }
        public DateTime? CertificationExpirationDate { get; set; }
        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? BranchName { get; set; }
        public string? LocationCode { get; set; }
        public string? LocationName { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsiblePersonName { get; set; }
        public string? ToolTypeCode { get; set; }
        public string? ToolTypeName { get; set; }
        public string? ToolCategoryCode { get; set; }
        public string? ToolCategoryName { get; set; }
        public string OperationalStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string PhysicalStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string CustodyStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string ReconciliationStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string SyncStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    private sealed class LifeCycleEventItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public Guid ToolAssetId { get; set; }
        public string EventType { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Title { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? PreviousValue { get; set; }
        public string? NewValue { get; set; }
        public DateTime EventDate { get; set; }
        public string? PerformedBy { get; set; }
    }
}

@rendermode InteractiveServer

<PageTitle>Documentos - NAVI Herramientas</PageTitle>

    <div>
        <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm mb-2" @onclick="GoBack">
            ? Volver a hoja de vida
        </button>

        <h1>Gestiµn de documentos</h1>
        <p>Carga fichas tÕcnicas, fotografÚas, evidencias y documentos asociados a la herramienta.</p>
    </div>

    <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" @onclick="LoadAsync" disabled="@isLoading">
        @(isLoading ? "Cargando..." : "Recargar")
    </button>
</div>

    <div class="alert alert-danger">

                    <option value="MaintenanceEvidence">Evidencia de mantenimiento</option>
                    <option value="Other">Otro</option>

@code {
    [Parameter]
    public Guid ToolId { get; set; }

    private const long MaxFileSize = 50 * 1024 * 1024;

    private bool isLoading;
    private bool isSaving;
    private string? errorMessage;
    private string? successMessage;
    private string internalCode = string.Empty;
    private string toolName = string.Empty;
    private string apiBaseUrl = string.Empty;

    private IBrowserFile? selectedFile;

    private DocumentUploadFormModel formModel = new()
    {
        DocumentType = "TechnicalDocument"
    };

    private List<DocumentItemModel> documents = new();

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            isLoading = true;
            errorMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");
            apiBaseUrl = client.BaseAddress?.ToString().TrimEnd('/') ?? "http://localhost:5218";

            var record = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<TechnicalLifeRecordHeaderModel>($"api/tools/{ToolId}/technical-life-record");

            if (record is not null)
            {
                internalCode = record.Summary.InternalCode;
                toolName = record.Summary.Name;
            }

            documents = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<List<DocumentItemModel>>($"api/tools/{ToolId}/documents") ?? new();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudieron cargar los documentos. Valida que la API estÕ activa. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private void OnFileSelected(InputFileChangeEventArgs e)
    {
        selectedFile = e.File;
        successMessage = null;
        errorMessage = null;
    }

    private async Task UploadAsync()
    {
        if (selectedFile is null)
        {
            errorMessage = "Debe seleccionar un archivo.";
            return;
        }

        try
        {
            isSaving = true;
            errorMessage = null;
            successMessage = null;

            var extension = Path.GetExtension(selectedFile.Name).ToLowerInvariant();
            var allowedExtensions = new[] { ".pdf", ".jpg", ".jpeg", ".png", ".xlsx", ".xls", ".docx" };

            if (!allowedExtensions.Contains(extension))
            {
                errorMessage = "Tipo de archivo no permitido. Use PDF, JPG, JPEG, PNG, XLSX, XLS o DOCX.";
                return;
            }

            if (selectedFile.Size > MaxFileSize)
            {
                errorMessage = "El archivo supera el tamaþo mÃximo permitido de 50 MB.";
                return;
            }

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            using var form = new MultipartFormDataContent();

            await using var fileStream = selectedFile.OpenReadStream(MaxFileSize);
            using var fileContent = new StreamContent(fileStream);

            fileContent.Headers.ContentType = new MediaTypeHeaderValue(
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(selectedFile.ContentType)
                    ? "application/octet-stream"
                    : selectedFile.ContentType);

            form.Add(fileContent, "file", selectedFile.Name);
            form.Add(new StringContent(formModel.DocumentType ?? "Other"), "documentType");
            form.Add(new StringContent(formModel.Description ?? string.Empty), "description");
            form.Add(new StringContent("yquinto"), "uploadedBy");

            var response = await client.PostAsync($"api/tools/{ToolId}/documents", form);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var detail = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                errorMessage = $"No se pudo cargar el documento. Cµdigo: {(int)response.StatusCode}. Detalle: {detail}";
                return;
            }

            successMessage = "Documento cargado correctamente.";

            selectedFile = null;
            formModel = new DocumentUploadFormModel
            {
                DocumentType = "TechnicalDocument"
            };

            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo cargar el documento. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isSaving = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task DeleteAsync(DocumentItemModel item)
    {
        try
        {
            isSaving = true;
            errorMessage = null;
            successMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            var response = await client.DeleteAsync($"api/tools/documents/{item.Id}?deletedBy=yquinto");

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var detail = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                errorMessage = $"No se pudo desactivar el documento. Cµdigo: {(int)response.StatusCode}. Detalle: {detail}";
                return;
            }

            successMessage = $"Documento desactivado correctamente: {item.FileName}.";
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo desactivar el documento. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isSaving = false;
        }
    }

    private void GoBack()
    {
        NavigationManager.NavigateTo($"/tools/{ToolId}/technical-life-record");
    }

    private string BuildDownloadUrl(string? downloadUrl)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(downloadUrl))
        {
            return "#";
        }

        if (downloadUrl.StartsWith("http", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            return downloadUrl;
        }

        return $"{apiBaseUrl}{downloadUrl}";
    }

    private static string TranslateDocumentType(string? value)
    {
        return value switch
        {
            "TechnicalDocument" => "Documento tÕcnico",
            "PhotographicRecord" => "Registro fotogrÃfico",
            "MaintenanceEvidence" => "Evidencia mantenimiento",
            "Other" => "Otro",
            _ => value ?? "-"
        };
    }

    private static string GetDocumentIcon(string? value)
    {
        return value switch
        {
            "PhotographicRecord" => "???",
            "MaintenanceEvidence" => "??",
            "TechnicalDocument" => "??",
            _ => "??"
        };
    }

    private static string Show(string? value)
    {
        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "-" : value;
    }

    private static string FormatDate(DateTime value)
    {
        return value.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm");
    }

    private static string FormatBytes(long value)
    {
        if (value >= 1024 * 1024)
        {
            return $"{value / 1024d / 1024d:0.00} MB";
        }

        if (value >= 1024)
        {
            return $"{value / 1024d:0.00} KB";
        }

        return $"{value} bytes";
    }

    private sealed class DocumentUploadFormModel
    {
        public string? DocumentType { get; set; }

        public string? Description { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class DocumentItemModel
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }

        public Guid ToolAssetId { get; set; }

        public string DocumentType { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public string FileName { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public string? ObjectKey { get; set; }

        public string? ContentType { get; set; }

        public long SizeBytes { get; set; }

        public string? UploadedBy { get; set; }

        public DateTime UploadedAt { get; set; }

        public string? Description { get; set; }

        public string? DownloadUrl { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class TechnicalLifeRecordHeaderModel
    {
        public SummaryInfo Summary { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class SummaryInfo
    {
        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }
}

<PageTitle>Trazabilidad de hoja de vida</PageTitle>
