}

@code {
    [Parameter]
    public Guid ToolId { get; set; }

    private TechnicalLifeRecordModel? record;
    private bool isLoading = true;
    private string? errorMessage;
    private string searchText = string.Empty;
    private string selectedEventType = string.Empty;
    private List<LifeCycleEventModel> filteredEvents = new();

    private IEnumerable<string> EventTypes =>
        record?.LifeCycleEvents
            .Select(x => x.EventType)
            .Where(x => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x))
            .Distinct(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .OrderBy(x => TranslateEventType(x))
        ?? Enumerable.Empty<string>();

    private IEnumerable<EventTypeOption> EventTypeOptions =>
        record?.LifeCycleEvents
            .Where(x => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x.EventType))
            .GroupBy(x => x.EventType.Trim(), StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .Select(x => new EventTypeOption
            {
                Value = x.Key,
                Label = TranslateEventType(x.Key),
                Count = x.Count()
            })
            .OrderBy(x => x.Label)
        ?? Enumerable.Empty<EventTypeOption>();

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            isLoading = true;
            errorMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            record = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<TechnicalLifeRecordModel>(
                $"api/tools/{ToolId}/technical-life-record");

            ApplyFilters();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo cargar la trazabilidad. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private void OnSearchTextChanged(ChangeEventArgs args)
    {
        searchText = args.Value?.ToString() ?? string.Empty;
        ApplyFilters();
    }

    private void OnEventTypeChanged(ChangeEventArgs args)
    {
        selectedEventType = args.Value?.ToString() ?? string.Empty;
        ApplyFilters();
    }

    private void SelectEventType(string value)
    {
        selectedEventType = value;
        ApplyFilters();
    }

    private void ApplyFilters()
    {
        var query = record?.LifeCycleEvents.AsEnumerable()
            ?? Enumerable.Empty<LifeCycleEventModel>();

        var eventTypeFilter = selectedEventType?.Trim() ?? string.Empty;
        var textFilter = searchText?.Trim() ?? string.Empty;

        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(eventTypeFilter))
        {
            query = query.Where(x =>
                string.Equals(x.EventType?.Trim(), eventTypeFilter, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
        }

        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(textFilter))
        {
            query = query.Where(x =>
                Contains(x.EventType, textFilter) ||
                Contains(TranslateEventType(x.EventType), textFilter) ||
                Contains(x.Title, textFilter) ||
                Contains(x.Description, textFilter) ||
                Contains(x.PreviousValue, textFilter) ||
                Contains(x.NewValue, textFilter) ||
                Contains(x.PerformedBy, textFilter));
        }

        filteredEvents = query
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.EventDate)
            .ToList();

        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private void ClearFilters()
    {
        searchText = string.Empty;
        selectedEventType = string.Empty;
        ApplyFilters();
    }

    private string GetFilterButtonClass(string value)
    {
        var isActive = string.Equals(
            selectedEventType?.Trim() ?? string.Empty,
            value?.Trim() ?? string.Empty,
            StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        return isActive
            ? "traceability-filter-chip active"
            : "traceability-filter-chip";
    }

    private static string TranslateEventType(string? value)
    {
        return value switch
        {
            "DefaultSafePracticesCreated" => "PrÃcticas seguras creadas",
            "DocumentDeleted" => "Documento eliminado",
            "DocumentUploaded" => "Documento cargado",
            "MaintenanceEvidenceDocumentCleared" => "Evidencia limpiada",
            "MaintenanceScheduleCreated" => "Mantenimiento creado",
            "MaintenanceScheduleDeleted" => "Mantenimiento eliminado",
            "MaintenanceScheduleUpdated" => "Mantenimiento actualizado",
            "MockTechnicalLifeRecordDataApplied" => "Datos simulados aplicados",
            "TechnicalDataUpdated" => "Datos tÕcnicos actualizados",
            "ToolAccessoryCreated" => "Accesorio creado",
            "ToolAccessoryUpdated" => "Accesorio actualizado",
            "ToolAccessoryDeleted" => "Accesorio eliminado",
            "DefaultSafePracticesApplied" => "PrÃcticas aplicadas",
            "ToolSafePracticeCreated" => "PrÃctica segura creada",
            "ToolSafePracticeUpdated" => "PrÃctica segura actualizada",
            "ToolSafePracticeDeleted" => "PrÃctica segura eliminada",
            _ => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "Sin tipo" : value
        };
    }

    private static bool Contains(string? value, string filter)
    {
        return !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value)
            && value.Contains(filter, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }

    private static string Show(string? value)
    {
        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "-" : value;
    }

    private static string FormatDate(DateTime value)
    {
        return value.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy");
    }

    private static string FormatTime(DateTime value)
    {
        return value.ToString("HH:mm");
    }

    private sealed class EventTypeOption
    {
        public string Value { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Label { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int Count { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class TechnicalLifeRecordModel
    {
        public SummaryModel Summary { get; set; } = new();
        public List<LifeCycleEventModel> LifeCycleEvents { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class SummaryModel
    {
        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    private sealed class LifeCycleEventModel
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string EventType { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Title { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? PreviousValue { get; set; }
        public string? NewValue { get; set; }
        public string? PerformedBy { get; set; }
        public DateTime EventDate { get; set; }
    }
}

@code {
    [Parameter]
    public Guid ToolId { get; set; }

    private bool isLoading;
    private bool isSaving;
    private string? errorMessage;
    private string? successMessage;
    private string internalCode = string.Empty;
    private string toolName = string.Empty;
    private Guid? editingMaintenanceId;

    private MaintenanceFormModel formModel = new()
    {
        Type = "Preventive",
        Status = "Scheduled",
        ScheduledAt = DateTime.Today.AddDays(30),
        IsToolOperational = true
    };

    private List<MaintenanceItemModel> maintenanceRecords = new();
    private List<DocumentItemModel> documents = new();

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            isLoading = true;
            errorMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            var record = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<TechnicalLifeRecordHeaderModel>($"api/tools/{ToolId}/technical-life-record");

            if (record is not null)
            {
                internalCode = record.Summary.InternalCode;
                toolName = record.Summary.Name;
            }

            maintenanceRecords = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<List<MaintenanceItemModel>>($"api/tools/{ToolId}/maintenance-schedule") ?? new();
            documents = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<List<DocumentItemModel>>($"api/tools/{ToolId}/documents") ?? new();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo cargar el cronograma. Valida que la API estÕ activa. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task SaveAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            isSaving = true;
            errorMessage = null;
            successMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            HttpResponseMessage response;

            if (editingMaintenanceId.HasValue)
            {
                var payload = BuildPayload("updated");
                response = await client.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/tools/maintenance-schedule/{editingMaintenanceId.Value}", payload);
            }
            else
            {
                var payload = BuildPayload("created");
                response = await client.PostAsJsonAsync($"api/tools/{ToolId}/maintenance-schedule", payload);
            }

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var detail = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                errorMessage = $"No se pudo guardar el mantenimiento. Cµdigo: {(int)response.StatusCode}. Detalle: {detail}";
                return;
            }

            successMessage = editingMaintenanceId.HasValue
                ? "Mantenimiento actualizado correctamente."
                : "Mantenimiento creado correctamente.";

            CancelEdit();
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo guardar el mantenimiento. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isSaving = false;
        }
    }

    private object BuildPayload(string mode)
    {
        return new
        {
            maintenanceNumber = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.MaintenanceNumber)
                ? null
                : formModel.MaintenanceNumber,

            type = formModel.Type,
            status = formModel.Status,
            scheduledAt = formModel.ScheduledAt,
            startedAt = formModel.StartedAt,
            finishedAt = formModel.FinishedAt,
            provider = formModel.Provider,
            technician = formModel.Technician,
            description = formModel.Description,
            maintenanceActivities = formModel.MaintenanceActivities,
            executionNotes = formModel.ExecutionNotes,
            invoiceNumber = formModel.InvoiceNumber,
            responsibleName = formModel.ResponsibleName,
            responsiblePosition = formModel.ResponsiblePosition,
            isToolOperational = formModel.IsToolOperational,
            evidenceDocumentId = GetSelectedEvidenceDocumentId(),
            cost = formModel.Cost,
            result = formModel.Result,
            createdBy = mode == "created" ? "yquinto" : null,
            updatedBy = mode == "updated" ? "yquinto" : null
        };
    }

    private void StartEdit(MaintenanceItemModel item)
    {
        editingMaintenanceId = item.Id;

        formModel = new MaintenanceFormModel
        {
            MaintenanceNumber = item.MaintenanceNumber,
            Type = item.Type,
            Status = item.Status,
            ScheduledAt = item.ScheduledAt.Date,
            StartedAt = item.StartedAt?.Date,
            FinishedAt = item.FinishedAt?.Date,
            Provider = item.Provider,
            Technician = item.Technician,
            Description = item.Description,
            MaintenanceActivities = item.MaintenanceActivities,
            ExecutionNotes = item.ExecutionNotes,
            InvoiceNumber = item.InvoiceNumber,
            ResponsibleName = item.ResponsibleName,
            ResponsiblePosition = item.ResponsiblePosition,
            IsToolOperational = item.IsToolOperational ?? true,
            EvidenceDocumentIdText = item.EvidenceDocumentId?.ToString(),
            Cost = item.Cost,
            Result = item.Result
        };

        successMessage = null;
        errorMessage = null;
    }

    private void CancelEdit()
    {
        editingMaintenanceId = null;

        formModel = new MaintenanceFormModel
        {
            Type = "Preventive",
            Status = "Scheduled",
            ScheduledAt = DateTime.Today.AddDays(30),
            IsToolOperational = true
        };
    }

    private async Task DeleteAsync(MaintenanceItemModel item)
    {
        try
        {
            isSaving = true;
            errorMessage = null;
            successMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            var response = await client.DeleteAsync($"api/tools/maintenance-schedule/{item.Id}?deletedBy=yquinto");

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var detail = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                errorMessage = $"No se pudo desactivar el mantenimiento. Cµdigo: {(int)response.StatusCode}. Detalle: {detail}";
                return;
            }

            successMessage = $"Mantenimiento desactivado correctamente: {item.MaintenanceNumber}.";

            if (editingMaintenanceId == item.Id)
            {
                CancelEdit();
            }

            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo desactivar el mantenimiento. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isSaving = false;
        }
    }

    private void GoBack()
    {
        NavigationManager.NavigateTo($"/tools/{ToolId}/technical-life-record");
    }

    private string GetSaveButtonText()
    {
        if (isSaving)
        {
            return "Guardando...";
        }

        return editingMaintenanceId.HasValue
            ? "Actualizar mantenimiento"
            : "Crear mantenimiento";
    }

    private static string Show(string? value)
    {
        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "-" : value;
    }

    private static string FormatDate(DateTime value)
    {
        return value.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy");
    }

    private static string FormatMoney(decimal? value)
    {
        return value.HasValue ? value.Value.ToString("C0") : "-";
    }

    private Guid? GetSelectedEvidenceDocumentId()
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.EvidenceDocumentIdText))
        {
            return null;
        }

        return Guid.TryParse(formModel.EvidenceDocumentIdText, out var documentId)
            ? documentId
            : null;
    }

    private string GetEvidenceFileName(Guid? documentId)
    {
        if (!documentId.HasValue)
        {
            return "-";
        }

        var document = documents.FirstOrDefault(x => x.Id == documentId.Value);

        return document is null
            ? "-"
            : document.FileName;
    }

    private string GetEvidenceDisplay(Guid? documentId)
    {
        var fileName = GetEvidenceFileName(documentId);

        return fileName == "-"
            ? "-"
            : fileName;
    }

    private bool HasEvidence(Guid? documentId)
    {
        return documentId.HasValue && documents.Any(x => x.Id == documentId.Value);
    }

    private string BuildEvidenceDownloadUrl(Guid? documentId)
    {
        if (!documentId.HasValue)
        {
            return "#";
        }

        var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");
        var baseUrl = client.BaseAddress?.ToString().TrimEnd('/') ?? "http://localhost:5218";

        return $"{baseUrl}/api/tools/documents/{documentId.Value}/download";
    }

    private static string TranslateDocumentType(string? value)
    {
        return value switch
        {
            "TechnicalDocument" => "Documento tÕcnico",
            "PhotographicRecord" => "Registro fotogrÃfico",
            "MaintenanceEvidence" => "Evidencia mantenimiento",
            "Other" => "Otro",
            _ => value ?? "-"
        };
    }

    private static string TranslateType(string? value)
    {
        return value switch
        {
            "Preventive" => "Preventivo",
            "Corrective" => "Correctivo",
            "Calibration" => "Calibraciµn",
            "Inspection" => "Inspecciµn",
            _ => value ?? "-"
        };
    }

    private static string TranslateStatus(string? value)
    {
        return value switch
        {
            "Scheduled" => "Programado",
            "InProgress" => "En proceso",
            "Completed" => "Completado",
            "Cancelled" => "Cancelado",
            _ => value ?? "-"
        };
    }

    private sealed class MaintenanceFormModel
    {
        public string? MaintenanceNumber { get; set; }
        public string Type { get; set; } = "Preventive";
        public string Status { get; set; } = "Scheduled";
        public DateTime ScheduledAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? StartedAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? FinishedAt { get; set; }
        public string? Provider { get; set; }
        public string? Technician { get; set; }
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? MaintenanceActivities { get; set; }
        public string? ExecutionNotes { get; set; }
        public string? InvoiceNumber { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsibleName { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsiblePosition { get; set; }
        public bool IsToolOperational { get; set; } = true;
                public string? EvidenceDocumentIdText { get; set; }
        public decimal? Cost { get; set; }
        public string? Result { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class MaintenanceItemModel
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public Guid ToolAssetId { get; set; }
        public string MaintenanceNumber { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Type { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Status { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public DateTime ScheduledAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? StartedAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? FinishedAt { get; set; }
        public string? Provider { get; set; }
        public string? Technician { get; set; }
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? MaintenanceActivities { get; set; }
        public string? ExecutionNotes { get; set; }
        public string? InvoiceNumber { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsibleName { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsiblePosition { get; set; }
        public bool? IsToolOperational { get; set; }
        public Guid? EvidenceDocumentId { get; set; }
        public decimal? Cost { get; set; }
        public string? Result { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class DocumentItemModel
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }

        public string DocumentType { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public string FileName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    private sealed class TechnicalLifeRecordHeaderModel
    {
        public SummaryInfo Summary { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class SummaryInfo
    {
        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }
}

@page "/tools"
@rendermode InteractiveServer
@inject IHttpClientFactory HttpClientFactory

<PageTitle>Inventario maestro - NAVI Herramientas</PageTitle>

<div class="page-header">
    <div>
        <h1>Inventario maestro</h1>
        <p>Consulta general de herramientas y activos registrados en NAVI.</p>
    </div>

    <button class="btn btn-primary" @onclick="LoadToolsAsync" disabled="@isLoading">
        @(isLoading ? "Actualizando..." : "Actualizar")
    </button>
</div>

@if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(errorMessage))
{
    <div class="alert alert-danger">
        <strong>Error:</strong> @errorMessage
    </div>
}
else if (isLoading && tools.Count == 0)
{
    <div class="alert alert-info">
        Cargando inventario desde la API...
    </div>
}
else
{
    <div class="inventory-summary">
        <div class="inventory-summary-card">
            <span>Total</span>
            <strong>@tools.Count</strong>
        </div>

        <div class="inventory-summary-card success">
            <span>Disponibles</span>
            <strong>@tools.Count(x => x.OperationalStatus == "Available")</strong>
        </div>

        <div class="inventory-summary-card warning">
            <span>Pendientes validaciµn</span>
            <strong>@tools.Count(x => x.OperationalStatus == "PendingValidation")</strong>
        </div>

        <div class="inventory-summary-card danger">
            <span>Bloqueadas</span>
            <strong>@tools.Count(IsBlocked)</strong>
        </div>
    </div>


    <section class="inventory-status-filters">
        <button type="button"
                class="@GetStatusFilterChipClass(string.Empty)"
                @onclick="@(() => SelectStatus(string.Empty))">
            Todos
            <span>@tools.Count</span>
        </button>

        @foreach (var option in StatusFilterOptions)
        {
            <button type="button"
                    class="@GetStatusFilterChipClass(option.Value)"
                    @onclick="@(() => SelectStatus(option.Value))">
                @option.Label
                <span>@option.Count</span>
            </button>
        }
    </section>
    <section class="inventory-panel">
        <div class="inventory-toolbar">
            <input class="form-control"
                   placeholder="Buscar por cµdigo, nombre, serial, sede, tipo o categorÚa..."
                   @bind="searchText"
                   @bind:event="oninput" />

            <select class="form-select" @bind="selectedStatus">
                <option value="">Todos los estados</option>
                @foreach (var status in tools.Select(x => x.OperationalStatus).Where(x => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x)).Distinct().OrderBy(x => x))
                {
                    <option value="@status">@GetStatusLabel(status)</option>
                }
            </select>

            <select class="form-select" @bind="selectedBranch">
                <option value="">Todas las sedes</option>
                @foreach (var branch in tools.Select(x => x.BranchCode).Where(x => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x)).Distinct().OrderBy(x => x))
                {
                    <option value="@branch">@branch</option>
                }
            </select>
        </div>

        <div class="inventory-count">
            Mostrando <strong>@FilteredTools.Count()</strong> de <strong>@tools.Count</strong> herramientas.
        </div>

        <div class="table-responsive">
            <table class="table table-hover align-middle inventory-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Cµdigo</th>
                        <th>Herramienta</th>
                        <th>Sede</th>
                        <th>Tipo</th>
                        <th>CategorÚa</th>
                        <th>Serial</th>
                        <th>Estado</th>
                        <th>Clase</th>
                        <th>Acciones</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var tool in FilteredTools)
                    {
                        <tr>
                            <td>
                                <strong>@tool.InternalCode</strong>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <strong>@tool.Name</strong>
                                @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(tool.Description))
                                {
                                    <br />
                                    <small class="text-muted">@tool.Description</small>
                                }
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <span>@tool.BranchCode</span>
                                @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(tool.BranchName))
                                {
                                    <br />
                                    <small class="text-muted">@tool.BranchName</small>
                                }
                            </td>
                            <td>@ShowValue(tool.ToolTypeName)</td>
                            <td>@ShowValue(tool.ToolCategoryName)</td>
                            <td>@ShowValue(tool.SerialNumber)</td>
                            <td>
                                <span class="@GetInventoryStatusClass(tool.OperationalStatus)">
                                    <span class="inventory-status-dot"></span>
                                    @GetStatusLabel(tool.OperationalStatus)
                                </span>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                @if (tool.IsSpecialized)
                                {
                                    <span class="inventory-class-badge specialized">Especializada</span>
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span class="inventory-class-badge normal">No especializada</span>
                                }
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <div class="d-flex gap-1 flex-wrap">
                                    <a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" href="@($"/tools/{tool.Id}")">
                                        Ver
                                    </a>

                                    <a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-dark" href="@($"/tools/{tool.Id}/technical-life-record")">
                                        Hoja vida
                                    </a>
                                </div>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
    </section>
}

@code {
    private bool isLoading;
    private string? errorMessage;
    private string searchText = string.Empty;
    private string selectedStatus = string.Empty;
    private string selectedBranch = string.Empty;

    private List<ToolListItem> tools = new();

    private IEnumerable<StatusFilterOption> StatusFilterOptions =>
        tools
            .Where(x => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x.OperationalStatus))
            .GroupBy(x => x.OperationalStatus)
            .Select(x => new StatusFilterOption
            {
                Value = x.Key,
                Label = GetStatusLabel(x.Key),
                Count = x.Count()
            })
            .OrderBy(x => x.Label);

    private IEnumerable<ToolListItem> FilteredTools =>
        tools
            .Where(MatchesSearch)
            .Where(x => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(selectedStatus) || x.OperationalStatus == selectedStatus)
            .Where(x => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(selectedBranch) || x.BranchCode == selectedBranch)
            .OrderBy(x => x.BranchCode)
            .ThenBy(x => x.InternalCode);

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadToolsAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadToolsAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            isLoading = true;
            errorMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            tools = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<List<ToolListItem>>("api/tools") ?? new();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo cargar el inventario. Valida que la API estÕ activa en http://localhost:5218. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private void SelectStatus(string status)
    {
        selectedStatus = status;
    }

    private string GetStatusFilterChipClass(string status)
    {
        var isActive = string.Equals(
            selectedStatus ?? string.Empty,
            status ?? string.Empty,
            StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        return isActive
            ? $"{GetInventoryStatusClass(status)} inventory-status-filter-chip active"
            : $"{GetInventoryStatusClass(status)} inventory-status-filter-chip";
    }

    private bool MatchesSearch(ToolListItem tool)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchText))
        {
            return true;
        }

        var value = searchText.Trim();

        return Contains(tool.InternalCode, value)
            || Contains(tool.Name, value)
            || Contains(tool.Description, value)
            || Contains(tool.SerialNumber, value)
            || Contains(tool.FixedAssetCode, value)
            || Contains(tool.FenixCode, value)
            || Contains(tool.BranchCode, value)
            || Contains(tool.BranchName, value)
            || Contains(tool.ToolTypeName, value)
            || Contains(tool.ToolCategoryName, value)
            || Contains(tool.OperationalStatus, value);
    }

    private static bool Contains(string? source, string value)
    {
        return !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(source)
            && source.Contains(value, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }

    private static bool IsBlocked(ToolListItem tool)
    {
        return tool.OperationalStatus is "Damaged"
            or "NotSuitable"
            or "InMaintenance"
            or "PendingDisposal"
            or "Disposed"
            or "NotLocated"
            or "Inconsistent";
    }

    private static string ShowValue(string? value)
    {
        return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "-" : value;
    }

    private static string GetStatusLabel(string? status)
    {
        return status switch
        {
            "Available" => "Disponible",
            "Assigned" => "Asignada",
            "Loaned" => "Prestada",
            "InMaintenance" => "En mantenimiento",
            "Damaged" => "Daþada",
            "NotSuitable" => "No apta",
            "PendingValidation" => "Pendiente validaciµn",
            "Inconsistent" => "Inconsistente",
            "NotLocated" => "No localizada",
            "PendingDisposal" => "Pendiente de baja",
            "Disposed" => "Dada de baja",
            _ => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(status) ? "Sin estado" : status
        };
    }

    private static string GetInventoryStatusClass(string? status)
    {
        return status switch
        {
            "Available" => "inventory-status-pill status-success",
            "Assigned" => "inventory-status-pill status-success",
            "Loaned" => "inventory-status-pill status-info",
            "InMaintenance" => "inventory-status-pill status-warning",
            "PendingValidation" => "inventory-status-pill status-warning",
            "Damaged" => "inventory-status-pill status-danger",
            "NotSuitable" => "inventory-status-pill status-danger",
            "Inconsistent" => "inventory-status-pill status-danger",
            "NotLocated" => "inventory-status-pill status-danger",
            "PendingDisposal" => "inventory-status-pill status-danger",
            "Disposed" => "inventory-status-pill status-neutral",
            _ => "inventory-status-pill status-neutral"
        };
    }

    private static string GetStatusBadgeClass(string? status)
    {
        return status switch
        {
            "Available" => "badge bg-success",
            "PendingValidation" => "badge bg-warning text-dark",
            "Loaned" => "badge bg-info text-dark",
            "InMaintenance" => "badge bg-primary",
            "Damaged" => "badge bg-danger",
            "NotSuitable" => "badge bg-danger",
            "NotLocated" => "badge bg-dark",
            "Inconsistent" => "badge bg-danger",
            "Disposed" => "badge bg-secondary",
            _ => "badge bg-secondary"
        };
    }

    private sealed class StatusFilterOption
    {
        public string Value { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Label { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int Count { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class ToolListItem
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }
        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public string? Brand { get; set; }
        public string? Model { get; set; }
        public string? SerialNumber { get; set; }
        public string? FixedAssetCode { get; set; }
        public string? FenixCode { get; set; }
        public string? BranchCode { get; set; }
        public string? BranchName { get; set; }
        public string? LocationCode { get; set; }
        public string? LocationName { get; set; }
        public string? ResponsiblePersonName { get; set; }
        public string? ToolTypeCode { get; set; }
        public string? ToolTypeName { get; set; }
        public string? ToolCategoryCode { get; set; }
        public string? ToolCategoryName { get; set; }
        public string OperationalStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string PhysicalStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string CustodyStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string ReconciliationStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string SyncStatus { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public bool IsSpecialized { get; set; }
    }
}

@page "/tools/{ToolId:guid}/safe-practices"
@rendermode InteractiveServer
@using System.Net.Http.Json
@inject IHttpClientFactory HttpClientFactory
@inject NavigationManager NavigationManager

<PageTitle>PrÃcticas seguras - NAVI Herramientas</PageTitle>

<div class="page-header">
    <div>
        <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm mb-2" @onclick="GoBack">
            ? Volver a hoja de vida
        </button>

        <h1>Gestiµn de prÃcticas seguras</h1>
        <p>Agrega, edita o desactiva prÃcticas seguras asociadas a la herramienta.</p>
    </div>

    <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" @onclick="LoadAsync" disabled="@isLoading">
        @(isLoading ? "Cargando..." : "Recargar")
    </button>
</div>

@if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(errorMessage))

    <div class="alert alert-danger">

<section class="life-record-cover">
    <div>

    </div>

    <div class="life-record-cover-status">
        <span class="badge bg-light text-dark">@safePractices.Count prÃctica(s)</span>

<div class="safe-practices-manage-grid">
    <section class="life-record-section">
        <div class="section-title">
            <span>1</span>
            <h2>@(editingSafePracticeId.HasValue ? "Editar prÃctica segura" : "Nueva prÃctica segura")</h2>

        <EditForm Model="formModel" OnValidSubmit="SaveAsync">
            <div class="edit-form-grid">
                <div>
                    <label>Orden</label>
                    <InputNumber class="form-control" @bind-Value="formModel.SortOrder" />

            <div class="mt-3">
                <label>Descripciµn</label>
                <InputTextArea class="form-control technical-observation"
                               @bind-Value="formModel.Description"
                               placeholder="Describe la prÃctica segura..." />
            </div>

            <div class="technical-edit-actions static-actions mt-3">
                @if (editingSafePracticeId.HasValue)
                {
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" @onclick="CancelEdit">
                        Cancelar ediciµn
                    </button>
                }

                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary" disabled="@isSaving">
                    @GetSaveButtonText()
                </button>
            </div>
        </EditForm>
    </section>

    <section class="life-record-section">
        <div class="section-title section-title-actions">
            <div class="section-title-main">
                <span>2</span>
                <h2>PrÃcticas registradas</h2>
            </div>

            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-dark" @onclick="CreateDefaultsAsync" disabled="@isSaving">
                Cargar predeterminadas
            </button>
        </div>

        @if (isLoading)
        {
            <div class="alert alert-info mb-0">Cargando prÃcticas seguras...</div>
        }
        else if (safePractices.Count == 0)
        {
            <p class="text-muted mb-0">No hay prÃcticas seguras registradas para esta herramienta.</p>

        else
        {
            <div class="safe-practices-list-admin">
                @foreach (var item in safePractices)

                        <div>

                                    Editar
                                </button>

                                    Desactivar

@code {
    [Parameter]
    public Guid ToolId { get; set; }

    private bool isLoading;
    private bool isSaving;
    private string? errorMessage;
    private string? successMessage;
    private string internalCode = string.Empty;
    private string toolName = string.Empty;
    private Guid? editingSafePracticeId;

    private SafePracticeFormModel formModel = new()
    {
        SortOrder = 1
    };

    private List<SafePracticeItemModel> safePractices = new();

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            isLoading = true;
            errorMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            var record = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<TechnicalLifeRecordHeaderModel>($"api/tools/{ToolId}/technical-life-record");

            if (record is not null)
            {
                internalCode = record.Summary.InternalCode;
                toolName = record.Summary.Name;
            }

            safePractices = await client.GetFromJsonAsync<List<SafePracticeItemModel>>($"api/tools/{ToolId}/safe-practices") ?? new();

            if (!editingSafePracticeId.HasValue && safePractices.Count > 0 && formModel.SortOrder <= 1)
            {
                formModel.SortOrder = safePractices.Max(x => x.SortOrder) + 1;
            }
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudieron cargar las prÃcticas seguras. Valida que la API estÕ activa. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isLoading = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task SaveAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            isSaving = true;
            errorMessage = null;
            successMessage = null;

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.PracticeName))
            {
                errorMessage = "El nombre de la prÃctica segura es obligatorio.";
                return;
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(formModel.Description))
            {
                errorMessage = "La descripciµn de la prÃctica segura es obligatoria.";
                return;
            }

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            HttpResponseMessage response;

            if (editingSafePracticeId.HasValue)
            {
                var payload = new
                {
                    practiceName = formModel.PracticeName,
                    description = formModel.Description,
                    sortOrder = formModel.SortOrder,
                    updatedBy = "yquinto"
                };

                response = await client.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/tools/safe-practices/{editingSafePracticeId.Value}", payload);
            }
            else
            {
                var payload = new
                {
                    practiceName = formModel.PracticeName,
                    description = formModel.Description,
                    sortOrder = formModel.SortOrder,
                    createdBy = "yquinto"
                };

                response = await client.PostAsJsonAsync($"api/tools/{ToolId}/safe-practices", payload);
            }

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var detail = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                errorMessage = $"No se pudo guardar la prÃctica segura. Cµdigo: {(int)response.StatusCode}. Detalle: {detail}";
                return;
            }

            successMessage = editingSafePracticeId.HasValue
                ? "PrÃctica segura actualizada correctamente."
                : "PrÃctica segura creada correctamente.";

            CancelEdit();
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo guardar la prÃctica segura. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isSaving = false;
        }
    }

    private async Task CreateDefaultsAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            isSaving = true;
            errorMessage = null;
            successMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            var response = await client.PostAsync($"api/tools/{ToolId}/safe-practices/defaults", null);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var detail = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                errorMessage = $"No se pudieron cargar prÃcticas predeterminadas. Cµdigo: {(int)response.StatusCode}. Detalle: {detail}";
                return;
            }

            successMessage = "PrÃcticas seguras predeterminadas cargadas correctamente.";
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudieron cargar prÃcticas predeterminadas. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isSaving = false;
        }
    }

    private void StartEdit(SafePracticeItemModel item)
    {
        editingSafePracticeId = item.Id;

        formModel = new SafePracticeFormModel
        {
            PracticeName = item.PracticeName,
            Description = item.Description,
            SortOrder = item.SortOrder
        };

        successMessage = null;
        errorMessage = null;
    }

    private void CancelEdit()
    {
        editingSafePracticeId = null;

        var nextOrder = safePractices.Count == 0
            ? 1
            : safePractices.Max(x => x.SortOrder) + 1;

        formModel = new SafePracticeFormModel
        {
            SortOrder = nextOrder
        };
    }

    private async Task DeleteAsync(SafePracticeItemModel item)
    {
        try
        {
            isSaving = true;
            errorMessage = null;
            successMessage = null;

            var client = HttpClientFactory.CreateClient("NaviApi");

            var response = await client.DeleteAsync($"api/tools/safe-practices/{item.Id}?deletedBy=yquinto");

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var detail = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                errorMessage = $"No se pudo desactivar la prÃctica segura. Cµdigo: {(int)response.StatusCode}. Detalle: {detail}";
                return;
            }

            successMessage = $"PrÃctica segura desactivada correctamente: {item.PracticeName}.";

            if (editingSafePracticeId == item.Id)
            {
                CancelEdit();
            }

            await LoadAsync();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            errorMessage = $"No se pudo desactivar la prÃctica segura. Detalle: {ex.Message}";
        }
        finally
        {
            isSaving = false;
        }
    }

    private void GoBack()
    {
        NavigationManager.NavigateTo($"/tools/{ToolId}/technical-life-record");
    }

    private string GetSaveButtonText()
    {
        if (isSaving)
        {
            return "Guardando...";
        }

        return editingSafePracticeId.HasValue
            ? "Actualizar prÃctica"
            : "Crear prÃctica";
    }

    private sealed class SafePracticeFormModel
    {
        public string? PracticeName { get; set; }

        public string? Description { get; set; }

        public int SortOrder { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class SafePracticeItemModel
    {
        public Guid Id { get; set; }

        public Guid ToolAssetId { get; set; }

        public string PracticeName { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public string Description { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public int SortOrder { get; set; }
    }

    private sealed class TechnicalLifeRecordHeaderModel
    {
        public SummaryInfo Summary { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class SummaryInfo
    {
        public string InternalCode { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }
}

ARCHIVO: src\Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin\Components\Pages\Weather.razor

@page "/weather"
@attribute [StreamRendering]

<PageTitle>Weather</PageTitle>

<h1>Weather</h1>

<p>This component demonstrates showing data.</p>

@if (forecasts == null)
{
    <p><em>Loading...</em></p>
}
else
{
    <table class="table">
        <thead>
            <tr>
                <th>Date</th>
                <th>Temp. (C)</th>
                <th>Temp. (F)</th>
                <th>Summary</th>
            </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
            @foreach (var forecast in forecasts)
            {
                <tr>
                    <td>@forecast.Date.ToShortDateString()</td>
                    <td>@forecast.TemperatureC</td>
                    <td>@forecast.TemperatureF</td>
                    <td>@forecast.Summary</td>
                </tr>
            }
        </tbody>
    </table>
}

@code {
    private WeatherForecast[]? forecasts;

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        // Simulate asynchronous loading to demonstrate streaming rendering
        await Task.Delay(500);

        var startDate = DateOnly.FromDateTime(DateTime.Now);
        var summaries = new[] { "Freezing", "Bracing", "Chilly", "Cool", "Mild", "Warm", "Balmy", "Hot", "Sweltering", "Scorching" };
        forecasts = Enumerable.Range(1, 5).Select(index => new WeatherForecast
        {
            Date = startDate.AddDays(index),
            TemperatureC = Random.Shared.Next(-20, 55),
            Summary = summaries[Random.Shared.Next(summaries.Length)]
        }).ToArray();
    }

    private class WeatherForecast
    {
        public DateOnly Date { get; set; }
        public int TemperatureC { get; set; }
        public string? Summary { get; set; }
        public int TemperatureF => 32 + (int)(TemperatureC / 0.5556);
    }
}

ARCHIVO: src\Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin\Program.cs
TAMAîO: 645 bytes

using Navi.ToolsAssets.Admin.Components;

var builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);

builder.Services.AddRazorComponents()
    .AddInteractiveServerComponents();

builder.Services.AddHttpClient("NaviApi", client =>
{
    client.BaseAddress = new Uri(builder.Configuration["NaviApi:BaseUrl"] ?? "http://localhost:5218");
});

var app = builder.Build();

if (!app.Environment.IsDevelopment())
{
    app.UseExceptionHandler("/Error", createScopeForErrors: true);
    app.UseHsts();
}

app.UseHttpsRedirection();

app.UseStaticFiles();
app.UseAntiforgery();

app.MapRazorComponents<App>()
    .AddInteractiveServerRenderMode();

app.Run();

    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(75, 0, 92, 0.25);
    border-color: #4b005c !important;
}

using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using Navi.ToolsAssets.Infrastructure.Persistence.Context;

namespace Navi.ToolsAssets.Api.Controllers;

[ApiController]
[Route("api/catalogs")]
public class CatalogsController : ControllerBase
{
    private readonly NaviToolsAssetsDbContext _context;

    public CatalogsController(NaviToolsAssetsDbContext context)
    {
        _context = context;
    }

    [HttpGet("tool-types")]
    public async Task<IActionResult> GetToolTypes()
    {
        var items = await _context.ToolTypes
            .AsNoTracking()
            .OrderBy(x => x.Code)
            .Select(x => new
            {
                x.Id,
                x.Code,
                x.Name,
                x.Description,
                x.IsActive
            })
            .ToListAsync();

        return Ok(items);
    }

    [HttpGet("tool-categories")]
    public async Task<IActionResult> GetToolCategories()
    {
        var items = await _context.ToolCategories
            .AsNoTracking()
            .OrderBy(x => x.Code)
            .Select(x => new
            {
                x.Id,
                x.Code,
                x.Name,
                x.Description,
                x.IsActive
            })
            .ToListAsync();

        return Ok(items);
    }

    [HttpGet("responsible-people")]
    public async Task<IActionResult> GetResponsiblePeople()
    {
        var items = await _context.ResponsiblePeople
            .AsNoTracking()
            .OrderBy(x => x.FullName)
            .Select(x => new
            {
                x.Id,
                x.EmployeeCode,
                x.DocumentNumber,
                x.FullName,
                x.Email,
                x.Position,
                x.Area,
                x.IsActive
            })
            .ToListAsync();

        return Ok(items);
    }
}

ARCHIVO: src\Navi.ToolsAssets.Api\Controllers\DamagesController.cs
TAMAîO: 13962 bytes

using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using Navi.ToolsAssets.Domain.Entities.Damages;
using Navi.ToolsAssets.Domain.Entities.LifeCycles;
using Navi.ToolsAssets.Domain.Enums;
using Navi.ToolsAssets.Infrastructure.Persistence.Context;

namespace Navi.ToolsAssets.Api.Controllers;

[ApiController]
[Route("api/damages")]
public class DamagesController : ControllerBase
{
    private readonly NaviToolsAssetsDbContext _context;

    public DamagesController(NaviToolsAssetsDbContext context)
    {
        _context = context;
    }

    [HttpGet]
    public async Task<IActionResult> GetDamages()
    {
        var damages = await _context.DamageReports
            .AsNoTracking()
            .Include(x => x.ToolAsset)
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.ReportedAt)
            .Select(x => new
            {
                x.Id,
                x.ReportNumber,
                x.ToolAssetId,
                ToolInternalCode = x.ToolAsset == null ? null : x.ToolAsset.InternalCode,
                ToolName = x.ToolAsset == null ? null : x.ToolAsset.Name,
                Severity = x.Severity.ToString(),
                SeverityLabel = GetSeverityLabel(x.Severity),
                x.Description,
                x.ReportedAt,
                x.ReportedBy,
                x.ActionTaken,
                x.BlocksLoan,
                IsClosed = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x.ActionTaken),
                x.CreatedAt,
                x.CreatedBy,
                x.UpdatedAt,
                x.UpdatedBy
            })
            .ToListAsync();

        return Ok(damages);
    }

    [HttpGet("{id:guid}")]
    public async Task<IActionResult> GetDamageById(Guid id)
    {
        var damage = await _context.DamageReports
            .AsNoTracking()
            .Include(x => x.ToolAsset)
            .Where(x => x.Id == id)
            .Select(x => new
            {
                x.Id,
                x.ReportNumber,
                x.ToolAssetId,
                ToolInternalCode = x.ToolAsset == null ? null : x.ToolAsset.InternalCode,
                ToolName = x.ToolAsset == null ? null : x.ToolAsset.Name,
                Severity = x.Severity.ToString(),
                SeverityLabel = GetSeverityLabel(x.Severity),
                x.Description,
                x.ReportedAt,
                x.ReportedBy,
                x.ActionTaken,
                x.BlocksLoan,
                IsClosed = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x.ActionTaken),
                x.CreatedAt,
                x.CreatedBy,
                x.UpdatedAt,
                x.UpdatedBy
            })
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync();

        if (damage is null)
        {
            return NotFound(new { Message = $"No se encontrµ el reporte de daþo con Id {id}." });
        }

        return Ok(damage);
    }

    [HttpGet("by-tool/{toolId:guid}")]
    public async Task<IActionResult> GetDamagesByTool(Guid toolId)
    {
        var damages = await _context.DamageReports
            .AsNoTracking()
            .Where(x => x.ToolAssetId == toolId)
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.ReportedAt)
            .Select(x => new
            {
                x.Id,
                x.ReportNumber,
                x.ToolAssetId,
                Severity = x.Severity.ToString(),
                SeverityLabel = GetSeverityLabel(x.Severity),
                x.Description,
                x.ReportedAt,
                x.ReportedBy,
                x.ActionTaken,
                x.BlocksLoan,
                IsClosed = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x.ActionTaken)
            })
            .ToListAsync();

        return Ok(damages);
    }

    [HttpGet("by-code/{internalCode}")]
    public async Task<IActionResult> GetDamagesByToolInternalCode(string internalCode)
    {
        var code = NormalizeCode(internalCode);

        var damages = await _context.DamageReports
            .AsNoTracking()
            .Include(x => x.ToolAsset)
            .Where(x => x.ToolAsset != null && x.ToolAsset.InternalCode == code)
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.ReportedAt)
            .Select(x => new
            {
                x.Id,
                x.ReportNumber,
                x.ToolAssetId,
                ToolInternalCode = x.ToolAsset == null ? null : x.ToolAsset.InternalCode,
                ToolName = x.ToolAsset == null ? null : x.ToolAsset.Name,
                Severity = x.Severity.ToString(),
                SeverityLabel = GetSeverityLabel(x.Severity),
                x.Description,
                x.ReportedAt,
                x.ReportedBy,
                x.ActionTaken,
                x.BlocksLoan,
                IsClosed = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x.ActionTaken)
            })
            .ToListAsync();

        return Ok(damages);
    }

    [HttpPost("report")]
    public async Task<IActionResult> ReportDamage([FromBody] ReportDamageRequest request)
    {
        if (request.ToolAssetId is null && string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.ToolInternalCode))
        {
            return BadRequest(new { Message = "Debe indicar el Id de la herramienta o el cµdigo interno." });
        }

        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.Description))
        {
            return BadRequest(new { Message = "La descripciµn del daþo o novedad es obligatoria." });
        }

        var toolQuery = _context.ToolAssets.AsQueryable();

        var tool = request.ToolAssetId is not null
            ? await toolQuery.FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.Id == request.ToolAssetId.Value)
            : await toolQuery.FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.InternalCode == NormalizeCode(request.ToolInternalCode!));

        if (tool is null)
        {
            return NotFound(new { Message = "No se encontrµ la herramienta." });
        }

        if (tool.OperationalStatus == ToolOperationalStatus.Disposed)
        {
            return BadRequest(new { Message = "No se puede reportar daþo operativo sobre una herramienta dada de baja." });
        }

        var severity = ParseSeverity(request.Severity);
        var changedBy = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.ReportedBy)
            ? "api"
            : request.ReportedBy.Trim();

        var previousOperationalStatus = tool.OperationalStatus;

        var newOperationalStatus = severity == ToolDamageSeverity.Critical
            ? ToolOperationalStatus.NotSuitable
            : ToolOperationalStatus.Damaged;

        var report = new DamageReport
        {
            ReportNumber = $"DAN-{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMddHHmmss}",
            ToolAssetId = tool.Id,
            Severity = severity,
            Description = request.Description.Trim(),
            ReportedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
            ReportedBy = changedBy,
            BlocksLoan = request.BlocksLoan ?? true,
            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
            CreatedBy = changedBy
        };

        tool.OperationalStatus = newOperationalStatus;
        tool.PhysicalStatus = ToolPhysicalStatus.Damaged;
        tool.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
        tool.UpdatedBy = changedBy;

        _context.DamageReports.Add(report);

        AddToolLifeCycleEvent(
            tool.Id,
            "DamageReported",
            "Daþo o novedad reportada",
            report.Description,
            previousOperationalStatus.ToString(),
            newOperationalStatus.ToString(),
            changedBy);

        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();

        return CreatedAtAction(nameof(GetDamageById), new { id = report.Id }, new
        {
            report.Id,
            report.ReportNumber,
            report.ToolAssetId,
            ToolInternalCode = tool.InternalCode,
            ToolName = tool.Name,
            Severity = report.Severity.ToString(),
            SeverityLabel = GetSeverityLabel(report.Severity),
            report.Description,
            report.ReportedAt,
            report.ReportedBy,
            report.BlocksLoan,
            ToolOperationalStatus = tool.OperationalStatus.ToString(),
            ToolPhysicalStatus = tool.PhysicalStatus.ToString()
        });
    }

    [HttpPatch("{id:guid}/close")]
    public async Task<IActionResult> CloseDamage(Guid id, [FromBody] CloseDamageRequest request)
    {
        var damage = await _context.DamageReports
            .Include(x => x.ToolAsset)
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.Id == id);

        if (damage is null)
        {
            return NotFound(new { Message = $"No se encontrµ el reporte de daþo con Id {id}." });
        }

        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.ActionTaken))
        {
            return BadRequest(new { Message = "Debe indicar la acciµn tomada para cerrar la novedad." });
        }

        var changedBy = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.ClosedBy)
            ? "api"
            : request.ClosedBy.Trim();

        damage.ActionTaken = request.ActionTaken.Trim();
        damage.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
        damage.UpdatedBy = changedBy;

        string? previousOperationalStatus = null;
        string? newOperationalStatus = null;

        if (damage.ToolAsset is not null && (request.ChangeToolStatus ?? true))
        {
            var targetStatus = ParseOperationalStatus(request.TargetOperationalStatus);

            if (targetStatus == ToolOperationalStatus.Loaned)
            {
                return BadRequest(new { Message = "No se puede cerrar una novedad cambiando la herramienta directamente a Prestada." });
            }

            previousOperationalStatus = damage.ToolAsset.OperationalStatus.ToString();

            damage.ToolAsset.OperationalStatus = targetStatus;

            if (targetStatus == ToolOperationalStatus.Available)
            {
                damage.ToolAsset.PhysicalStatus = ToolPhysicalStatus.Good;
            }

            damage.ToolAsset.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
            damage.ToolAsset.UpdatedBy = changedBy;

            newOperationalStatus = damage.ToolAsset.OperationalStatus.ToString();
        }

        AddToolLifeCycleEvent(
            damage.ToolAssetId,
            "DamageClosed",
            "Daþo o novedad cerrada",
            damage.ActionTaken,
            previousOperationalStatus,
            newOperationalStatus,
            changedBy);

        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();

        return Ok(new
        {
            damage.Id,
            damage.ReportNumber,
            damage.ToolAssetId,
            damage.ActionTaken,
            ClosedBy = changedBy,
            ClosedAt = damage.UpdatedAt,
            ToolOperationalStatus = damage.ToolAsset == null ? null : damage.ToolAsset.OperationalStatus.ToString(),
            ToolPhysicalStatus = damage.ToolAsset == null ? null : damage.ToolAsset.PhysicalStatus.ToString()
        });
    }

    private static string NormalizeCode(string value)
    {
        return value.Trim().ToUpperInvariant();
    }

    private static ToolDamageSeverity ParseSeverity(string? value)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
        {
            return ToolDamageSeverity.Low;
        }

        if (Enum.TryParse<ToolDamageSeverity>(value.Trim(), ignoreCase: true, out var severity))
        {
            return severity;
        }

        return value.Trim().ToUpperInvariant() switch
        {
            "BAJA" => ToolDamageSeverity.Low,
            "MEDIA" => ToolDamageSeverity.Medium,
            "ALTA" => ToolDamageSeverity.High,
            "CRITICA" => ToolDamageSeverity.Critical,
            "CRëTICA" => ToolDamageSeverity.Critical,
            _ => ToolDamageSeverity.Low
        };
    }

    private static ToolOperationalStatus ParseOperationalStatus(string? value)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
        {
            return ToolOperationalStatus.Available;
        }

        if (Enum.TryParse<ToolOperationalStatus>(value.Trim(), ignoreCase: true, out var status))
        {
            return status;
        }

        return value.Trim().ToUpperInvariant() switch
        {
            "DISPONIBLE" => ToolOperationalStatus.Available,
            "DAîADA" => ToolOperationalStatus.Damaged,
            "DANADA" => ToolOperationalStatus.Damaged,
            "NO APTA" => ToolOperationalStatus.NotSuitable,
            "EN MANTENIMIENTO" => ToolOperationalStatus.InMaintenance,
            _ => ToolOperationalStatus.Available
        };
    }

    private static string GetSeverityLabel(ToolDamageSeverity severity)
    {
        return severity switch
        {
            ToolDamageSeverity.Low => "Baja",
            ToolDamageSeverity.Medium => "Media",
            ToolDamageSeverity.High => "Alta",
            ToolDamageSeverity.Critical => "CrÚtica",
            _ => severity.ToString()
        };
    }

    private void AddToolLifeCycleEvent(
        Guid toolAssetId,
        string eventType,
        string title,
        string description,
        string? previousValue,
        string? newValue,
        string changedBy)
    {
        _context.ToolLifeCycleEvents.Add(new ToolLifeCycleEvent
        {
            ToolAssetId = toolAssetId,
            EventType = eventType,
            Title = title,
            Description = description,
            PreviousValue = previousValue,
            NewValue = newValue,
            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
            CreatedBy = changedBy
        });
    }
}

public sealed class ReportDamageRequest
{
    public Guid? ToolAssetId { get; set; }

    public string? ToolInternalCode { get; set; }

    public string? Severity { get; set; }

    public string Description { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    public string? ReportedBy { get; set; }

    public bool? BlocksLoan { get; set; }
}

public sealed class CloseDamageRequest
{
    public string ActionTaken { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    public string? ClosedBy { get; set; }

    public bool? ChangeToolStatus { get; set; }

    public string? TargetOperationalStatus { get; set; }
}

ARCHIVO: src\Navi.ToolsAssets.Api\Controllers\DashboardController.cs
TAMAîO: 8629 bytes

using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using Navi.ToolsAssets.Domain.Enums;
using Navi.ToolsAssets.Infrastructure.Persistence.Context;

namespace Navi.ToolsAssets.Api.Controllers;

[ApiController]
[Route("api/dashboard")]
public class DashboardController : ControllerBase
{
    private readonly NaviToolsAssetsDbContext _context;

    public DashboardController(NaviToolsAssetsDbContext context)
    {
        _context = context;
    }

    [HttpGet("summary")]
    public async Task<IActionResult> GetSummary()
    {
        var tools = await _context.ToolAssets
            .AsNoTracking()
            .ToListAsync();

        var summary = new
        {
            TotalTools = tools.Count,
            AvailableTools = tools.Count(x => x.OperationalStatus == ToolOperationalStatus.Available),
            LoanedTools = tools.Count(x => x.OperationalStatus == ToolOperationalStatus.Loaned),
            InMaintenanceTools = tools.Count(x => x.OperationalStatus == ToolOperationalStatus.InMaintenance),
            DamagedTools = tools.Count(x => x.OperationalStatus == ToolOperationalStatus.Damaged),
            NotSuitableTools = tools.Count(x => x.OperationalStatus == ToolOperationalStatus.NotSuitable),
            NotLocatedTools = tools.Count(x => x.OperationalStatus == ToolOperationalStatus.NotLocated),
            PendingValidationTools = tools.Count(x => x.OperationalStatus == ToolOperationalStatus.PendingValidation),
            DisposedTools = tools.Count(x => x.OperationalStatus == ToolOperationalStatus.Disposed),
            SpecializedTools = tools.Count(x => x.IsSpecialized),
            NonSpecializedTools = tools.Count(x => !x.IsSpecialized),
            ReconciledTools = tools.Count(x => x.ReconciliationStatus == ToolReconciliationStatus.Validated),
            InconsistentTools = tools.Count(x => x.ReconciliationStatus == ToolReconciliationStatus.Inconsistent),
            SyncErrorTools = tools.Count(x => x.SyncStatus == ToolSyncStatus.SyncError),
            PendingSyncTools = tools.Count(x => x.SyncStatus == ToolSyncStatus.PendingSync),
            LastUpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
        };

        return Ok(summary);
    }

    [HttpGet("tools-by-status")]
    public async Task<IActionResult> GetToolsByStatus()
    {
        var tools = await _context.ToolAssets
            .AsNoTracking()
            .ToListAsync();

        var result = tools
            .GroupBy(x => x.OperationalStatus)
            .Select(x => new
            {
                Status = x.Key.ToString(),
                StatusLabel = GetOperationalStatusLabel(x.Key),
                Count = x.Count()
            })
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.Count)
            .ToList();

        return Ok(result);
    }

    [HttpGet("tools-by-branch")]
    public async Task<IActionResult> GetToolsByBranch()
    {
        var result = await _context.Branches
            .AsNoTracking()
            .Include(x => x.Zone)
            .Select(branch => new
            {
                BranchId = branch.Id,
                BranchCode = branch.Code,
                BranchName = branch.Name,
                ZoneCode = branch.Zone == null ? null : branch.Zone.Code,
                ZoneName = branch.Zone == null ? null : branch.Zone.Name,
                TotalTools = _context.ToolAssets.Count(tool => tool.BranchId == branch.Id),
                AvailableTools = _context.ToolAssets.Count(tool => tool.BranchId == branch.Id && tool.OperationalStatus == ToolOperationalStatus.Available),
                LoanedTools = _context.ToolAssets.Count(tool => tool.BranchId == branch.Id && tool.OperationalStatus == ToolOperationalStatus.Loaned),
                InMaintenanceTools = _context.ToolAssets.Count(tool => tool.BranchId == branch.Id && tool.OperationalStatus == ToolOperationalStatus.InMaintenance),
                DamagedTools = _context.ToolAssets.Count(tool => tool.BranchId == branch.Id && tool.OperationalStatus == ToolOperationalStatus.Damaged),
                NotLocatedTools = _context.ToolAssets.Count(tool => tool.BranchId == branch.Id && tool.OperationalStatus == ToolOperationalStatus.NotLocated)
            })
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.TotalTools)
            .ThenBy(x => x.BranchCode)
            .ToListAsync();

        return Ok(result);
    }

    [HttpGet("alerts")]
    public async Task<IActionResult> GetAlerts()
    {
        var damagedTools = await _context.ToolAssets
            .AsNoTracking()
            .Where(x => x.OperationalStatus == ToolOperationalStatus.Damaged
                || x.OperationalStatus == ToolOperationalStatus.NotSuitable)
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.UpdatedAt ?? x.CreatedAt)
            .Take(10)
            .Select(x => new
            {
                Type = "ToolBlocked",
                Severity = "High",
                ToolId = x.Id,
                x.InternalCode,
                x.Name,
                Status = x.OperationalStatus.ToString(),
                Message = "Herramienta bloqueada para prÕstamo por estado operativo.",
                Date = x.UpdatedAt ?? x.CreatedAt
            })
            .ToListAsync();

        var notLocatedTools = await _context.ToolAssets
            .AsNoTracking()
            .Where(x => x.OperationalStatus == ToolOperationalStatus.NotLocated)
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.UpdatedAt ?? x.CreatedAt)
            .Take(10)
            .Select(x => new
            {
                Type = "ToolNotLocated",
                Severity = "Critical",
                ToolId = x.Id,
                x.InternalCode,
                x.Name,
                Status = x.OperationalStatus.ToString(),
                Message = "Herramienta no localizada en toma fÚsica.",
                Date = x.UpdatedAt ?? x.CreatedAt
            })
            .ToListAsync();

        var syncErrors = await _context.ToolAssets
            .AsNoTracking()
            .Where(x => x.SyncStatus == ToolSyncStatus.SyncError
                || x.ReconciliationStatus == ToolReconciliationStatus.Inconsistent)
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.UpdatedAt ?? x.CreatedAt)
            .Take(10)
            .Select(x => new
            {
                Type = "SyncOrReconciliationError",
                Severity = "Medium",
                ToolId = x.Id,
                x.InternalCode,
                x.Name,
                Status = x.ReconciliationStatus.ToString(),
                Message = "Herramienta con inconsistencia de conciliaciµn o sincronizaciµn.",
                Date = x.UpdatedAt ?? x.CreatedAt
            })
            .ToListAsync();

        var alerts = damagedTools
            .Concat(notLocatedTools)
            .Concat(syncErrors)
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.Date)
            .Take(20)
            .ToList();

        return Ok(alerts);
    }

    [HttpGet("recent-activity")]
    public async Task<IActionResult> GetRecentActivity()
    {
        var events = await _context.ToolLifeCycleEvents
            .AsNoTracking()
            .Include(x => x.ToolAsset)
            .OrderByDescending(x => x.CreatedAt)
            .Take(30)
            .Select(x => new
            {
                x.Id,
                x.ToolAssetId,
                ToolInternalCode = x.ToolAsset == null ? null : x.ToolAsset.InternalCode,
                ToolName = x.ToolAsset == null ? null : x.ToolAsset.Name,
                x.EventType,
                x.Title,
                x.Description,
                x.PreviousValue,
                x.NewValue,
                EventDate = x.CreatedAt,
                PerformedBy = x.CreatedBy
            })
            .ToListAsync();

        return Ok(events);
    }

    private static string GetOperationalStatusLabel(ToolOperationalStatus status)
    {
        return status switch
        {
            ToolOperationalStatus.Available => "Disponible",
            ToolOperationalStatus.Assigned => "Asignada",
            ToolOperationalStatus.Loaned => "Prestada",
            ToolOperationalStatus.InMaintenance => "En mantenimiento",
            ToolOperationalStatus.Damaged => "Daþada",
            ToolOperationalStatus.NotSuitable => "No apta",
            ToolOperationalStatus.PendingValidation => "Pendiente de validaciµn",
            ToolOperationalStatus.Inconsistent => "Inconsistente",
            ToolOperationalStatus.NotLocated => "No localizada",
            ToolOperationalStatus.PendingDisposal => "Pendiente de baja",
            ToolOperationalStatus.Disposed => "Dada de baja",
            _ => status.ToString()
        };
    }
}



################################################################################
ARCHIVO: src\Navi.ToolsAssets.Api\Controllers\ImportsController.cs
TAMAîO: 38337 bytes
